name: Kennedy, Joe
subject: couldn't wait to connect, just off the stage
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kennedy for Massachusetts
body:
|
---
| | Hey there! I just stepped off the debate stage, and I hope I made you proud.

The common thread between the election of Donald Trump, the wreckage of COVID-19, and the protests against injustice in our streets is a government that has not listened to its people.

I have spent the last weeks criss-crossing the state and listening. Showing up. Making more than 50 stops last weekend alone. Hearing from our cities and towns that have been left behind by the politics and politicians of the past. People who are ready for change.

That's why it was so important to me, on that stage, to tell your stories. To stand up for you. To amplify your voice.

We are in the final stretch of this campaign. All eyes are on us to see if our message of change can get across the finish line. If you believe, as I do, that we need to reject the politics of the past, will you rush a grassroots donation to fuel our movement to September 1?

This is the best link to use. Grateful for your support. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/JKMA-ALL-Email-Aug2020-FR-Weekly?refcode=Joe-Post-Debate-Email](https://secure.kennedyforma.com/page/m/363907a8/55b66746/26da86eb/8091b3e/3133565383/VEsH/?g=wJ6aEDjfd5ldgcs4t9rIVg "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/JKMA-ALL-Email-Aug2020-FR-Weekly?refcode=E4681-20200811-Debate2-SL-CampaignNews-RegTemplate-NA-NA&amount=21")

Stay strong. Keep fighting. 21 more days.

-- Joe

|
---|---|---

| |
* * *

[](https://secure.kennedyforma.com/page/m/363907a8/55b66746/26da86eb/8091b3f/3133565383/VEsE/?g=wJ6aEDjfd5ldgcs4t9rIVg "https://www.facebook.com/JoeKennedyIII")[](https://secure.kennedyforma.com/page/m/363907a8/55b66746/26da86eb/8091b38/3133565383/VEsF/?g=wJ6aEDjfd5ldgcs4t9rIVg "https://twitter.com/joekennedy")[](https://secure.kennedyforma.com/page/m/363907a8/55b66746/26da86eb/8091b39/3133565383/VEsC/?g=wJ6aEDjfd5ldgcs4t9rIVg "https://www.instagram.com/joekennedyiii/")
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. You are receiving this email because Joe Kennedy is relying on you to help him take his fight for the basic dignity of every American family to the United States Senate. But if you'd like to receive fewer emails, we understand. You can request only to receive the most important emails [**here**](https://secure.kennedyforma.com/page/m/363907a8/55b66746/26da86eb/8091b3a/3133565383/VEsD/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/?g=wJ6aEDjfd5ldgcs4t9rIVg "https://action.joekennedyforcongress.com/page/s/less-email?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com") or you can unsubscribe **[here](https://secure.kennedyforma.com/page/m/363907a8/55b66746/26da86eb/8091b3b/3133565383/VEsA/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/?g=wJ6aEDjfd5ldgcs4t9rIVg "http://action.joekennedyforcongress.com/unsubscribe?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com")**. | [](https://secure.kennedyforma.?g=wJ6aEDjfd5ldgcs4t9rIVg "http://secure.actblue.com/donate/JKMA-ALL-Email-Aug2020-FR-Weekly?refcode=E4681-20200811-Debate2-CampaignNews-RegTemplate-NA-NA-footer&amount=10&amounts=3,25,50,100,250")
---
Joe Kennedy has dedicated his career to social and economic justice. A former Peace Corps member, legal aid volunteer, and assistant district attorney, Joe is one of the Trump Era's most powerful voices for moral clarity in the Democratic Party. **[Will you help get his voice to the United States Senate by making a contribution today?](https://secure.kennedyforma.?g=wJ6aEDjfd5ldgcs4t9rIVg "http://secure.actblue.com/donate/JKMA-ALL-Email-Aug2020-FR-Weekly?refcode=E4681-20200811-Debate2-CampaignNews-RegTemplate-NA-NA-footer&amount=10&amounts=3,25,50,100,250")**

**[DONATE](https://secure.kennedyforma.?g=wJ6aEDjfd5ldgcs4t9rIVg "http://secure.actblue.com/donate/JKMA-ALL-Email-Aug2020-FR-Weekly?refcode=E4681-20200811-Debate2-CampaignNews-RegTemplate-NA-NA-SB&amount=3&amounts=3,25,50,100,250")**
---

| Paid for by Kennedy for Massachusetts.
| This email was sent by **[Joe Kennedy](https://secure.kennedyforma.com/page/m/363907a8/55b66746/26da86eb/8091b46/3133565383/VEsHBQ/?g=wJ6aEDjfd5ldgcs4t9rIVg "https://www.kennedyforma.com/")**.
PO Box 15, Boston, MA 02137.

name: Biden-Harris HQ
subject: Peter, do you want to chat with Joe and Kamala?
body:
We're inviting 3 supporters to a special meet-and-greet with Kamala and Joe before our grassroots fundraiser tomorrow! |
---
Peter,

It's official: Kamala Harris is Joe Biden's running mate!!

And we have more exciting news. **We 're inviting 3 supporters to a special meet-and-greet with Kamala and Joe before our grassroots fundraiser tomorrow!**

If you take that extra step, and chip in, you'll automatically be entered to win one of those spots.

[**Chip in any amount, either $5 or whatever you can afford today, and you 'll be automatically entered to be a part of our pre-event discussion as they talk more in-depth about how they plan to win this thing and elect Democrats across the country:**](https://go.joebiden.%3D/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kamalaandjoefundraisercontest?refcode=JB_EM_VF_2020.08.11_B4_VPGRFR-CONTEST_X__F1_S1_C1__ac&amount=5&amounts=25,50,100,250&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&addr1=%0A&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bsd&utm_campaign=JB_EM_VF_2020.08.11_B4_VPGRFR-CONTEST_X__F1_S1_C1__ac") | If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:

Peter, thank you so much for supporting Joe Biden and the Democrats.

This isn't the time to be complacent. If you are ready to fight for the soul of this nation, you can start by donating to elect Joe Biden and Democrats up and down the ballot by clicking the button below.

| [DONATE »](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931bb64/1cd0ac28/161aa2ad0/357ef91f/1239885660/VEsEBw/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bvf-homepage&refcode=VF_EM_FR_2020.06.16_B8_footer_X__F1_S1_C1__footer?amount=25")

We know we send a lot of emails, and we are sorry about that. The reason? We are relying on grassroots supporters like you (we're serious!).

If you'd like to unsubscribe from our emails, you can [click here](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931bb64/1cd0ac28/161aa2ad0/357ef920/1239885660/VEsEBg/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/content/bvf-unsubscribe/").

We sincerely thank you for your help and support.
\- Biden Victory Fund
Paid for by Biden Victory Fund, a joint fundraising committee authorized by Biden for President, the Democratic National Committee and the State Democratic Parties in these states: AK, AL, AZ, CO, DE, FL, GA, ID, IN, KS, KY, LA, MA, MD, ME, MI, MN, MO, MS, MT, NC, ND, NE, NH, NJ, NM, NV, NY, OH, PA, SC, TN, TX, VA, VT, WI, AND WV.
_Contributions or gifts to Biden Victory Fund are not tax deductible.

No purchase, payment, or contribution is necessary to enter or win; nor will any purchase, payment or contribution improve chances of winning. Void where prohibited. Entries must be received by August 12, 2020. Enter by contributing [**here**](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931bb64/1cd0ac28/161aa2ad0/357ef91e/1239885660/VEsEAQ/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kamalaandjoefundraisercontest?refcode=JB_EM_FR_2020.06.15_contest-footer_X__F1_S1_C1__all") or alternatively, **[click here](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931bb64/1cd0ac28/161aa2ad0/357ef91d/1239885660/VEsEAA/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/s/kamala-and-joe-augustfr-contest?source=JB_EM_PET_20200614_contest-footer_X__F1_S1_C1__all")** to enter without contributing. By entering you agree to be bound by the official rules governing the sweepstakes, available **[here.](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931bb64/1cd0ac28/161aa2ad0/357ef91c/1239885660/VEsEAw/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/content/talk-with-kamala-and-joe-contest-rules")** Three winners will receive the following prize package: One (1) tickets to the Kamala and Joe Grassroots Fundraiser and a pre-event reception with Senator Kamala Harris and Vice President Biden. One Joe 2020 T-shirt from the Biden Victory Fund Store (approx. retail value $30). Winner will be selected by random drawing from all eligible entries to be held on or about 08/12/2020. The prize may be forfeited and awarded to an alternate eligible winner if two attempts to contact the winner by phone or email are not successful. Odds depend on number of entries received. Promotion open only to U.S. citizens, or lawful permanent U.S. residents who are legal residents of the 50 United States, District of Columbia and Puerto Rico; those 18 or older (or age of majority under applicable law); and those who would be lawfully permitted to accept the prize under applicable federal, state and local law. Sponsor: The Biden Victory Fund, 430 S Capitol St SE Washington DC 20003..

The first $5,600/$10,000 from a person/multicandidate committee ("PAC") will be allocated to Biden for President, with the first $2,800/$5,000 designated for the primary and the next $2,800/$5,000 for the general election. For contributions made after the primary, the full amount of the contribution, up to $2,800/$5,000, will be designated for the general election. The next $35,500/$15,000 from a person/PAC will be allocated to the DNC. The next $150,000/$75,000 from a person/PAC will be split equally among the Democratic state parties from: AZ, CO, FL, GA, MI, MN, NC, NE, NH, NV, OH, PA, TX, VA, and WI. The next $110,000/$55,000 from a person/PAC will be split equally among the Democratic state parties from: AL, DE, KS, LA, MA, MD, MS, NJ, NY, VT, and WV. The next $110,000/$55,000 from a person/PAC will be split equally among the Democratic state parties from: AK, ID, IN, KY, ME, MO, MT, ND, NM, SC, and TN. Any additional funds will be allocated to the DNC, subject to applicable contribution limits.

The allocation listed above may change if a contributor designates their contribution for a particular participant(s) or if following it would result in an excessive contribution. Contributions will be used in connection with federal elections, may be spent on any activity as each committee determines in its sole discretion, and will not be earmarked for any particular candidate. Federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the name, mailing address, occupation, and name of employer of individuals whose contributions exceed $200 per election cycle. _

name: =?utf-8?Q?Phil=20Scott?=
subject: Thank You!
body:
I’m thankful to all the Republicans, Democrats and independents who supported me in today’s Primary Election. |
---
| | [ ](https://philscott.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=bbb0245bb16226cd6570f0156&id=cf76205a03&e=19cebfe173)
---
| | | | | | [](https://philscott.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=bbb0245bb16226cd6570f0156&id=b1806192f4&e=19cebfe173) | [Share](https://philscott.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=bbb0245bb16226cd6570f0156&id=a36c856a2c&e=19cebfe173)
---|---
| | [](https://philscott.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=bbb0245bb16226cd6570f0156&id=e72e9c24a3&e=19cebfe173) | [Tweet](https://philscott.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=bbb0245bb16226cd6570f0156&id=36a7c1dc41&e=19cebfe173)
---|---
| | [](http://us13.forward-to-friend.com/forward?u=bbb0245bb16226cd6570f0156&id=15289afc21&e=19cebfe173) | [Forward to a Friend](http://us13.forward-to-friend.com/forward?u=bbb0245bb16226cd6570f0156&id=15289afc21&e=19cebfe173)
---|---
| Friend,
---
|
I’m thankful to all the Republicans, Democrats and independents who supported me in today’s primary election. The confidence you’ve placed in me during these incredibly unique and challenging times is an honor.

My reasons for serving haven't changed since I first decided to run for governor. I love Vermont and I believe, with leadership that listens, it can be an even better place to live, raise a family and grow a business. I ran for governor four years ago because I knew we could do more to help people. I knew we needed someone to focus like a laser on growing the economy, making Vermont more affordable, protecting the most vulnerable, and restoring civility and decency to our politics by running campaigns — and governing — in ways that are positive examples for our kids.

Admittedly, this year has changed almost everything about our lives — but for me, these principles remain.

As a state, and as a nation, we’re facing a once-in-a-century public health emergency and the economic crisis it’s created.

Unfortunately, these challenges won’t go away overnight, and we’ll be dealing with them in the months to come. In fact, even after there is a vaccine or other treatment, it may take years of disciplined work to help our economy and our communities fully recover.

Throughout these last few months, I’ve tracked the data closely, listened to the experts and followed the science.

Every decision I’ve made has been in the best interest of our health, our safety and our economic future. And I’m so proud of how Vermonters have stepped up to support our neighbors and communities — and as a result, our state has been an example for others across the nation. But we can’t let up now. We have to see this through to the end.

Moving forward, I’ll do my very best to provide you with a steady hand on the wheel as we navigate these unprecedented times and work tirelessly to emerge stronger as a state.

Thank you again for your continued support.

Sincerely,

Phil
---
| | | | | | [](https://philscott.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=bbb0245bb16226cd6570f0156&id=75e5b3b21e&e=19cebfe173)
---
| | [](https://philscott.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=bbb0245bb16226cd6570f0156&id=52f55fb273&e=19cebfe173)
---
| | [](https://philscott.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=bbb0245bb16226cd6570f0156&id=49b545b175&e=19cebfe173)
---
| | Phil Scott for Vermont, Glen Wright, Treasurer,
P.O. Box 988, Montpelier, VT, 05601

Want to change how you receive these emails?
You can [update your preferences](https://philscott.us13.list-manage.com/profile?u=bbb0245bb16226cd6570f0156&id=75128fb49c&e=19cebfe173) or [unsubscribe from this list](https://philscott.us13.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=bbb0245bb16226cd6570f0156&id=75128fb49c&e=19cebfe173&c=15289afc21)
---

name: Joe Biden
subject: My Running Mate Selection
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Democratic National Committee, [www
body:
You make a lot of important decisions as president. But the first one is who you select to be your Vice President. | |
---
Folks -- You make a lot of important decisions as president. But the first one is who you select to be your Vice President. I’ve decided that Kamala Harris is the best person to help me take this fight to Donald Trump and Mike Pence and then to lead this nation starting in January 2021. **[I’d like to tell you why, but first I’m going to ask you to add your name and welcome Kamala to our team.](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/GTcSsGdfDWzRRezYN3CORhmc1Jb_wxiTjRRHmSJnsVN05o35eYJq43-gxSyBeRiW_ORKF1sOKzWNgjJMRbqVBEH4JHADxD5H7rz2Qp_x-HZOEa2soiSsojLEYWx6iS4oVi5N7j5qWrrXhyDHvLJdo3zE-fymAcEXISIpQnC_CXRk27GcpVpIiDmb1TwrTxcHUo-lLW-ts6DCXtrD5w8u-mEVO6AZ_YPo4ZNPW7JIvBK41oMdntMe2soQgAt8PL1W3zXX88O-FJMpIkBQiBxnaw/349/PeOrJyK0QeeSzuuh0WZ6EA/h0/lpm5jdCEjW_IIrrl8-oPcbdQsEQM41W8nMuQutj_5Bo)** These aren’t normal times. For the first time in our history, we’re facing three historic crises -- all at the same time. We’re facing the worst pandemic in 100 years. The worst economic crisis since the Great Depression. The most powerful calls for racial justice in a generation. And we have a president who has both failed to lead on the virus -- costing lives and decimating our economy -- and fanned the flames of hate and division. I need someone working alongside me who is smart, tough, and ready to lead. Kamala is that person. I need someone who understands the pain that so many people in our nation are suffering. Whether they’ve lost their job, their business, a loved one to this virus. This president says he “doesn’t want to be distracted by it.” He doesn’t understand that taking care of the people of this nation -- all the people -- isn’t a distraction -- it’s the job. Kamala understands that. I need someone who understands that we are in a battle for the soul of this nation. And that if we’re going to get through these crises -- we need to come together and unite for a better America. Kamala gets that. If I’m President, I’m committed to making things better -- not just in the short term, but sustainably, structurally, and permanently. We won’t have time to delay. I need a partner who can help deliver on those promises, and quickly. I was privileged to serve this nation for two terms as Vice President alongside President Obama, a man of extraordinary character who I believe will go down in history as one of our great presidents. So, I know a thing or two about being Vice President. More than anything, I know it can’t be a political decision. It has to be a governing decision. If the people of this nation entrust me and Kamala with the office of President and Vice President for the next four years, we’re going to inherit a nation in crisis, a nation divided, and a world in disarray. We won’t have a minute to waste. That’s what led me to Kamala Harris. As a United States Senator from California, Kamala represents the biggest state in the union. She’s been one of the toughest and most effective Senators on two of the most important committees in the Senate -- Intelligence and Judiciary. Two committees that have directly dealt with some of the most important issues facing this nation at home and around the world. She sits on the Senate Select Committee on Intelligence, where she deals with the nation’s most sensitive threats. We’ve all watched her hold the Trump administration accountable for its corruption, stand up to a Justice Department that’s run amok, and be a powerful voice against their extreme nominations. She’s been a leader on criminal justice and marriage equality. And she has focused like a laser on the racial disparities as a result of the coronavirus. As California’s Attorney General, she led one of the biggest legal departments in the nation -- where she was a powerful advocate for people in taking on the big banks and protecting women and kids from abuse. She’s delivered billions in settlement money to consumers, taking on companies for fraud, pollution and abuse. I first met Kamala through my son Beau. They were both Attorneys General at the same time. He had enormous respect for her and her work. I thought a lot about that as I made this decision. There is no one’s opinion I valued more than Beau’s and I’m proud to have Kamala standing with me on this campaign. Her record of accomplishment -- fighting tooth and nail for what’s right -- is why I’m choosing her. There is no door Kamala won’t knock on, no stone she’ll leave unturned, if it means making life better -- _for the people._ **[So join me today in welcoming Kamala Harris to our team.](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/GTcSsGdfDWzRRezYN3CORhmc1Jb_wxiTjRRHmSJnsVN05o35eYJq43-gxSyBeRiW_ORKF1sOKzWNgjJMRbqVBEH4JHADxD5H7rz2Qp_x-HaY9HJYrkrAOniEE4xJ93Bfo80QafMNW5t4_u7_2DDliqEUptj3jtifv9QwbAocbKg4bjhp4OHnJ__q2ZF0DDBxH8Myy6jHcc3w1X92iqXBR-W0jJEjytBhpk_OjxkygVffgiXMykQjEWsweoBS2TkrNtCXjS6wqtlBshD-xDW3YA/349/PeOrJyK0QeeSzuuh0WZ6EA/h1/NieovrAkY3-Y5oQxhA4ojRQl_9MiOXILT9YKDWhbv2E)** She will wake up every day -- like I will -- thinking about how to make life better for people. How to rebuild our country back better. How to make it more just. How to win the next fight in the battle for the soul of this nation. Because that’s what the Presidency -- and the Vice Presidency -- is. It’s a duty to care: for you, for all of us. This will be the fight of our administration, and there’s no better partner that I could have asked for. Thanks for everything, \- Joe P.S. We’ll be holding a grassroots fundraiser tomorrow so she can get a chance to talk to some of the grassroots supporters who have powered this campaign. I’d love it if you could join us. **[So add your name to give her a warm welcome and then pitch in to join us.](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/GTcSsGdfDWzRRezYN3CORhmc1Jb_wxiTjRRHmSJnsVN05o35eYJq43-gxSyBeRiW_ORKF1sOKzWNgjJMRbqVBEH4JHADxD5H7rz2Qp_x-HbcZewhASLngcgv6ydn6yoMnIfBLv__A_QtfJcKjpfX6nqngQ-goQ1Pts2gxK8vN8d1Mbi4XABK5WaT2pRFVfP3xyoA9zQwjcy5EAkgwujJlzeeUYThKoqECJFdoLg2ruPKM6ft7obaBiPbF8bBIFA6pdwpFxJTPqOOExR_8RcCUg/349/PeOrJyK0QeeSzuuh0WZ6EA/h2/4T8F0-V-0eJ8S33VB_Ub0k23GWivrSHKpTxlaGOg-bg)**

If you no longer wish to receive emails from the DNC, ****[submit this form to unsubscribe](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXcOpy_XqN4R2ZGjoK-5zZnl7NBjmTZL5F5oqdT0MFW4GK4M_KkRVst3AZYpe4G4V-fe8dMAM_szZCnbRvjMv0y1BgNSShSWUsvJPUgFSJI9gCcDG0P8YZSfuhUSLNygq_nvf-_teQ3_Dz1DRQYfB-EH3-P0VrZpwmiYMCOcbDf5XRn8RUpOvq0ohWBNuTM3D-UUDcWDL0GJXU2dJkElUFAs6Cf_e4meYEdviHF1CJJFW1WgLpTmaom7CgWH_dtUb2vBgsaQdqLxJqTVCcEYzcIz8AbB-4UfXdhm_H-D5y9M06e9bantw22gSQGopUbv_b_SsLAtrFLDuk8i1ddhRJWNAD8b9cqF8rZPrqhsQVf5M/349/PeOrJyK0QeeSzuuh0WZ6EA/h3/OD7zV4Do67LsW5Hio-Zn8mlM9hOfHkOikFiUJrpxurU).**** If you’d only like to receive our most important messages, [**sign up to receive less email**](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/CMxF4nARlf6wAFa1PSfv0vWSczDM5JVQEwDVBPD9TM1UhWh3sKiW14eVe8q9SirKcgGPK5-JuKzbSSMWPTDnP6njSCMBY1M8mQUggTEdIFOpWEM0YQjVEgei3pO2qCrd_ViWTscB-Me2Ch_k4JvVmbfIsHJjkdc5X4uan-fHERuTdNNNnkwRVxwGNQkZF2NxCSnmszPdk0lqCg1oTbC46EBmRX4LQEfbcBjcKCapfsy5J_b8gXaz8RJnRo1QPA2BDHhQTWdISje7pZ2NRQSxwF2gTXYHzfhYJ-A9DHQKC6uQ46hgsbHGItle-gnwUe9b/349/PeOrJyK0QeeSzuuh0WZ6EA/h4/gExcWev_ePfjoCrASAJSemVzG8ZEf7SO_w4nq-nig1A).

If you’re ready to elect Democrats in all 50 states, [**make a contribution today**](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953zpUw_e_EZxmgaVXIHsJiEj8MeZLbCFJDC3fy6sIvlKZJmH-PaWjv0DMf9u2dfhNZYTW0_9JgeO8P71-yzFt_AlvQOzeDpzeb93fIBhXU2BiXsXSvrwiI5ZdiM-qVocHJQUAqmgdVxyWjbPqi1SduBBBrhXw8RSE6eBNIq1ZRaCVeUs3ZQgxMvgrNwPrACPAwIHyeaODgZSEuZsKytzADc9hQ2yd0K43yqVAJa5BTJTlGwjEsSYF4mDIMjyPPdjf9iTsOkzv352pCUzUGUhOwYY/349/PeOrJyK0QeeSzuuh0WZ6EA/h5/iC3jeWz56xLja2_N09EcmtHW4QVL45tRdeH6i2cnAaM).

Contributions or gifts to the Democratic National Committee are not tax deductible. Paid for by the Democratic National Committee, [www.Democrats.org](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/CMxF4nARlf6wAFa1PSfv0v7hRcDfAVm_iNQZKoRE94hD0TMh7IguPe8WSMUcGob2dxDLHp9mRPewxbHrf5tusCDlN9tncpidZ_2FXdEJedKsbkK8Xb6z_RBGWmOcYZrBggbZQDOs9XPCdRgNV7ZazfwjqQ52q7xUiISG6slskiB7mnO1TRJCpBKwdtF1P6P4OITwcuswBFXd-BhPuGrgsWXQpMa5KFclR-jqmEfnrwo/349/PeOrJyK0QeeSzuuh0WZ6EA/h6/gVlddzskDokeHuVVxWAD4xVX7fp6cWH0TiwXXIO5Wrg), and not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee.

name: Team Hagerty
subject: Our Hard Work Is Paying Off
body:
#TeamHagerty Updates Straight To Your Inbox
No images? [Click here](https://hfs.cmail19.com/t/t-e-pklhrud-fuutjhhtj-tl/) August 11, 2020 **WATCH: Team Hagerty Election Night Party** [](https://hfs.cmail19.com/t/t-l-pklhrud-fuutjhhtj-r/) Team Hagerty celebrated a big victory last week as Bill Hagerty was elected the Republican nominee in the U.S. Senate race for Tennessee. In his statement following the win, Bill said, "I'm honored and humbled to have the support of so many Christian conservatives across our great state. In the Senate, I will stand with President Trump and Senator Blackburn to protect our Tennessee conservative values."You can watch Team Hagerty's Election Night Watch Party in full **[HERE.](https://hfs.cmail19.com/t/t-l-pklhrud-fuutjhhtj-y/)** **Looking To November** We are so proud of all of the work Team Hagerty has done to get us this far, but the race isn't over yet! We have another election to win in November. This time, it's not just sending Bill to the Senate, we must elect President Donald Trump for four more years and stand up to the radical liberals who want to pust America into a socialist state. **#TeamHagerty Is Strong** [](https://hfs.cmail19.com/t/t-l-pklhrud-fuutjhhtj-j/) In his latest tweet supporting Bill's campaign, President Trump said that Team Hagerty is running an excellent campaign. We couldn't agree more, and it's because of all of the hard work and support of each of you. Team Hagerty released a new video last week highlighting the hard work of our team. Over the course of the campaign so far, we have made over two million personal voter contacts.You can see some of these moments by watching the full video [**HERE.**](https://hfs.cmail19.com/t/t-l-pklhrud-fuutjhhtj-t/) **LISTEN: Tele-Town Hall With President Trump** [](https://hfs.cmail19.com/t/t-l-pklhrud-fuutjhhtj-i/) Last week, President Donald Trump joined Bill Hagerty for a tele-town hall to speak to Tennesseans across the state. During the event, President Trump said, "As your next Senator, Bill will be a stalwart defender of our conservative values. He's proudly pro-life and pro-family and pro-gun. He's a Trump conservative, he's a friend of mine, he's a great guy."You can listen to the full tele-town hall **[HERE.](https://hfs.cmail19.com/t/t-l-pklhrud-fuutjhhtj-d/)**
## **Be A Part Of #TeamHagerty**
[TELL US WHY YOU SUPPORT BILL HAGERTY](https://hfs.cmail19.com/t/t-l-pklhrud-fuutjhhtj-h/) [DONATE TO THE CAMPAIGN](https://hfs.cmail19.com/t/t-l-pklhrud-fuutjhhtj-k/) [VOLUNTEER WITH #TEAMHAGERTY](https://hfs.cmail19.com/t/t-l-pklhrud-fuutjhhtj-u/)
## **Press Highlights**
**[AP News:](https://hfs.cmail19.com/t/t-l-pklhrud-fuutjhhtj-o/) **Trump boosts Hagerty on eve of Tennessee Senate GOP election**[Williamson Homepage:](https://hfs.cmail19.com/t/t-l-pklhrud-fuutjhhtj-m/) **Trump says Hagerty will help 'hold China accountable' in final effort to launch Senate candidate to victory**[AP:](https://hfs.cmail19.com/t/t-l-pklhrud-fuutjhhtj-c/) **Hagerty vs. Bradshaw in race to succeed US Sen. Alexander**[CNN:](https://hfs.cmail19.com/t/t-l-pklhrud-fuutjhhtj-q/)** Tennessee picks Trump-backed Bill Hagerty to be Senate Republican nominee**[WJHL:](https://hfs.cmail19.com/t/t-l-pklhrud-fuutjhhtj-a/) **Trump-backed Bill Hagerty winner of US Senate GOP primary**[The Federalist:](https://hfs.cmail19.com/t/t-l-pklhrud-fuutjhhtj-f/) **Trump-Endorsed Senate Candidate Bill Hagerty Wins Tennessee Primary
## **What They're Saying...**
> _"__Tennessee loving Bill Hagerty, who was my Tennessee Victory Chair and is now the very outstanding Ambassador to Japan, will be running for the U.S. Senate. He is strong on crime, borders & our 2nd A. Loves our Military & our Vets. Has my Complete & Total Endorsement!"_
> [-President Donald Trump](https://hfs.cmail19.com/t/t-l-pklhrud-fuutjhhtj-z/) _" TN's Bill Hagerty is my friend & has been a champion for President Donald Trump's AMERICA FIRST agenda from Day One. Bill will fight for Conservative values, stand up for Life, Protect 2A Rights & create American jobs. TN & America need Bill Hagerty in the Senate!" _
> [-Vice President Mike Pence](https://hfs.cmail19.com/t/t-l-pklhrud-fuutjhhtj-v/) _" I fully support Bill Hagerty for the #TNSen, because I need a true Tennessee conservative to stand with me to protect our shared values. Bill is a true conservative, & he will always fight for you. Send him to the Senate to work with me & President Donald Trump." _
> [-Senator Marsha Blackburn](https://hfs.cmail19.com/t/t-l-pklhrud-fuutjhhtj-e/) _" Tennessee - send Bill Hagerty to the Senate. He supported President Donald Trump in 2016 & has worked closely with him since. Bill is the ONLY Trump conservative in the #TNSen race. He has my total support." _
> [-Fox News' Sean Hannity](https://hfs.cmail19.com/t/t-l-pklhrud-fuutjhhtj-s/) _" Bill was really a member of Team Trump before it was politically advantageous - before anybody else said let's jump on board, and he's been ready to work with President Trump since day one and he wants to do the same for Tennessee families."_
> [-Lara Trump](https://hfs.cmail19.com/t/t-l-pklhrud-fuutjhhtj-g/) _" Bill was on the Trump train before it was politically expedient. My father trusts him, he believes in him. For my father to have endorsed Bill Hagerty early in a primary, tells you all you need to know about the man."_
> [-Donald Trump Jr.](https://hfs.cmail19.com/t/t-l-pklhrud-fuutjhhtj-w/)_" Ideologically, Bill is an unapologetic and a very proud conservative, and what I mean by that is he's for free markets, he is for freedom, not free stuff, and he respects the dignity and the liberty of each individual, and I know that's what makes him a conservative."_
> [-Kellyanne Conway](https://hfs.cmail19.com/t/t-l-pklhrud-fuutjhhtj-yd/) _" Bill has been a good friend, he was a great ambassador to the US in Tokyo and he is going to be a fantastic senator. If there is one word I would use to describe Bill it's fearless. Bill helped solidify and strengthen our relationship with Japan which is absolutely essential to us standing up to China. Believe me, I can tell you that Beijing noticed the minute Bill got on the ground."_
> [-Sen. Tom Cotton](https://hfs.cmail19.com/t/t-l-pklhrud-fuutjhhtj-yh/) _" Bill Hagerty is TERRIFIC! Can't wait to call him Senator Hagerty come November!"_
> [-KT McFarland](https://hfs.cmail19.com/t/t-l-pklhrud-fuutjhhtj-yk/) _" We are excited to endorse Bill Hagerty for Senate and are fully confident he will be an unwavering pro-life advocate. Bill has served his country and President Trump with distinction, and we're thrilled to see him bring his leadership to the United States Senate where he will continue to make Tennesseans proud."_
> [-Marilyn Musgrave](https://hfs.cmail19.com/t/t-l-pklhrud-fuutjhhtj-yu/) _" We need leaders like that on the floor of the U.S. Senate because frankly, the next couple of years are going to be about the Great American Come Back. The Great American Revival. That's why we need Bill Hagerty."_
> [-Larry Kudlow](https://hfs.cmail19.com/t/t-l-pklhrud-fuutjhhtj-jl/) _" I know that Bill Hagerty is a good quality Republican. He knows the value of conservative judges and is going to fight to support President Donald Trump. The President and I will continue to come back and support Bill Hagerty."_
> [-Nikki Haley](https://hfs.cmail19.com/t/t-l-pklhrud-fuutjhhtj-jr/) _" Let me take a moment to say what a blessing it is to have someone like Bill Hagerty. He is not only my friend but he's done a great job...as the Ambassador to Japan. But not only that, he is a huge supporter of law enforcement. I can't tell you how much he's helped me personally and...in Putnam County."_
> [-Eddie Farris, Sheriff](https://hfs.cmail19.com/t/t-l-pklhrud-fuutjhhtj-jy/) _" You may have questions about who to vote for and who to get out and elect this campaign season, and I want you to know where I stand. I stand with Bill Hagerty because of the fine values he has and he supports our President Donald J Trump. I ask for you to get out there and support Bill Hagerty and his campaign."_
> [-Mayor Robby Hatcher](https://hfs.cmail19.com/t/t-l-pklhrud-fuutjhhtj-jj/)
| [](https://hfs.cmail19.com/t/t-l-pklhrud-fuutjhhtj-jt/)| [](https://hfs.cmail19.com/t/t-l-pklhrud-fuutjhhtj-ji/)| [](https://hfs.cmail19.com/t/t-l-pklhrud-fuutjhhtj-jd/)| [](https://hfs.cmail19.com/t/t-l-pklhrud-fuutjhhtj-jh/)| [](https://hfs.cmail19.com/t/t-l-pklhrud-fuutjhhtj-jk/)

name: Team St. George
subject: ONLY ONE WEEK LEFT
body:
Friends and Supporters,_**1 week until election day!!**_ This last week is the final push to get Dr. James St. George elected and we NEED your support at the polls!**Make sure to do one of the following!**
* Return your mail in ballot
* Vote at an early poll station
* Vote on election day

Dr. James St. George is a political outsider. **Plain and simple.** He has never run for office or worked in politics. He is one of you, a constituent. What better person would you want to represent you in Congress than a non-politician.**[Learn where to vote on election day here.](https://jamesstgeorge.cmail20.com/t/r-l-jkhkude-ojijtnthh-r/)** _**Why is Dr. James St. George Running?**_ Dr. James St. George is 62 years old; he is not running for political prestige or for his career, he is running because he served his patients all of his life and now, he wants to serve his country. He saw the discourse in Washington and knew that he would be an asset to help push President Trump's agenda. _**Dr. James St. George is the most qualified**_ Dr. James St. George is the most qualified in this race. He is a conservative, successful business owner, physician, and not a politician. Dr. James St. George and his wife built their own business, St. Johns Vein Center, from the ground up and now has grown it into 4 offices managing 40 employees. Nothing was ever given to Dr. James St. George; he knows the value of hard work and doesn't believe in government handouts. Dr. James St. George is also a surgeon, he has been a physician for over 30 years. His healthcare knowledge and experience is needed in Washington to reform our healthcare system. Lawyers and bureaucrats have been making healthcare decisions for too long, our healthcare system is a mess, we need a doctor in Congress who actually knows how to tackle these issues head on! _**What can Dr. James St. George do for YOU as your next congressman?**_ Dr. James St. George is a straight shooter, he practices what he preaches regardless of backlash from the radical left. He will fight for our conservative values and help drain the swamp. He wants to prioritize helping small businesses because he understands from his own experience how hard excessive government regulations are for many employers in the area. He will work to create jobs in the district, just as he has for his business, and put a STOP to increasing our national debt. He will work to repeal Obamacare and expand access to healthcare while keeping the cost low. Our country is ill, and Dr. James St. George is the only one with the cure!It is important that you all go to the polls and vote for Dr. James St. George on August 18th. **He ALWAYS puts people over politics and will make sure District 3 never goes underrepresented!** See you out there!Team St. George [CLICK HERE TO DONATE](https://jamesstgeorge.cmail20.com/t/r-l-jkhkude-ojijtnthh-y/) | [](https://jamesstgeorge.cmail20.com/t/r-l-jkhkude-ojijtnthh-j/)| [](https://jamesstgeorge.cmail20.com/t/r-l-jkhkude-ojijtnthh-t/)| [](https://jamesstgeorge.cmail20.com/t/r-l-jkhkude-ojijtnthh-i/)
---|---|---
Physician, Businessman, Community Leader, Eagle Scout, Husband, Father, Christian, NRA-rated Marksman, Conservative, Republican... These are just a few of the words to describe Dr. James St. George. For more than a decade, James has served patients at his clinics throughout north Florida and played an active role in the medical community, helping to improve healthcare services throughout our area.
[Unsubscribe](https://jamesstgeorge.cmail20.com/t/r-u-jkhkude-ojijtnthh-d/)

Friend,

It is the honor of my life to serve our Country, alongside President Trump, as the 48th Vice President of the United States.

I see that Joe Biden has picked Senator Kamala Harris as his VP nominee.

That pick shows that Biden and the Democrat Party have been overtaken by the Radical Left. Given their promises of higher taxes, open borders, socialized medicine and Abortion on Demand, it’s no surprise he chose Senator Harris, she is weak on crime and refuses to put America First.

From the very first day of this Administration, President Trump has set our Nation on a path to freedom and opportunity. Joe Biden and Kamala Harris would set America on the path of SOCIALISM and DECLINE.

For the sake of American strength, jobs, law and order, our lives, and our liberties, we must defeat this radical duo on Election Day. The stakes have never been higher, and we need your help to send a message that this is YOUR Country, NOT THEIRS.

For the NEXT HOUR, all contributions will be 600%-MATCHED!

CONTRIBUTE ANY AMOUNT
Electing Joe Biden and Kamala Harris in November would be a grave mistake for this Nation with irreversible consequences. They will raise taxes, cut police funding, kill energy jobs, open our borders, and appease socialist dictators.

We cannot allow our Nation to go down that path.

President Trump and I are counting on our BEST supporters right now. Can we count on YOU to step up during this critical time?

http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=cbd15dc1df1b9896f3edb2bbfb6dc8c5ed34ffbdaf8c4e2651ff2932ae7538b158eb1d35d5bd787dc179f4aa39880cf4deb4a275e180219c

Mike Pence

D.A. won't pursue death in cop slaying
"San Francisco District Attorney Kamala Harris said Tuesday she will not seek the death penalty against a man accused of killing a San Francisco police officer over the weekend, a decision that legal experts say is rare if not unprecedented in California"

SF Gate, May 21, 2010
Judge rips Harris' office for hiding problems
"In a scathing ruling, the judge concluded that [Harris] had failed to fulfill their constitutional duty to tell defense attorneys about problems surrounding Deborah Madden, the now-retired technician at the heart of the cocaine-skimming scandal that led police to shut down the drug analysis section of their crime lab."

Your donation will allow us to do three important things:
**Organize**. More than ever before, organizing takes place online these days. As we prepare to scale up our phone-banking, texting, and other forms of volunteer recruitment, we will continue to invest in the latest tools for digital organizing.
**Get our ads up earlier to reach voters who will vote by mail.** More people will be voting well before Election Day this year and we need to make sure they hear about Josh before casting their ballot. We saw record vote-by-mail turnout in the June primary, and we need to invest in reaching all of those voters.
**Help us run a campaign we can be proud of.** Since day one, we’ve run a campaign that allows us to stick to our values because of the support of grassroots donors. Your contributions power this campaign and allow us to reject dark money from wealthy corporations.
We’re putting the final touches on our digital ads plan right now. name: Kat Cammack
subject: 6 days to go
body:
Help us reach more voters.
---
| | | | | |
---
| | |
---
| Patriot,
I'll cut right to the chase. We have to make 114,257 voter contacts between now and election day. It costs an average of $0.10 for each voter contact, so that means we need to raise $11,425.70 to meet our goal. Can you help us reach our goal?
Polling shows us having a lead, but we cannot let up now. [Can I count on your support to help fund our voter outreach?](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001--MU9SJfA974TdyEQBM_peOFLeKCuNYxJfK-v6IqkYGdOhuQTdJXHnSh2XUxY-Mtg3UApDZ-8g1BN7YAKomKIt_MV9CFXBtJXILYHe4jpDOf0ptnCveixlSmRFFm5vIA412hQsUgPNn5Jn2k0IWFf9uNjbChvsYpGVkloc_HoWI=&c=NfK7TNiZjTJJw5jtNwOChmhfMceIUjERXgRgb6VI5hQHJ6X6jcZe0A==&ch=-ffq8orQ8P9FNbhvXKWeiWuUGrdgJt0HNu1_2wGCy38I1LOIbAMlYw==)

Every dollar you donate helps us reach more voters.

name: Jon Ossoff (personal)
subject: Kamala Harris
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JON OSSOFF FOR SENATE
body:
Joe and Kamala are unstoppable. |
---
Friend,

**It's official: Kamala Harris is Joe Biden's running mate.**

Friend, feel the excitement. This is happening. Joe Biden and Kamala Harris is a dream ticket.

_And as our next Vice President, Kamala Harris will play a historic and integral role leading us out of one of the worst economic disasters in the last century and restoring dignity and competence to the American government._

**Friend, Joe and Kamala are unstoppable, and turnout in Georgia will shatter all records as we end the horrible Trump era and elect this historic team to open a new chapter in American history.**

**But -- and this is important, friend -- the GOP is already spending MILLIONS to stop Joe, Kamala, and me from winning in Georgia this November.**

**[So I'm asking at this critical moment, friend: Can you split a $20 dollar contribution between the Biden-Harris campaign and my own RIGHT NOW?](https://go.electjon.com/page/m/177e279a/5b2c1286/3edbf2b5/25f1f4df/1770545930/VEsH/?g=_FNKN1DdY9BfCqelLAMjFg "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_2020_08_11_vp?refcode=em_2020_08_11_vp&amount=20")**
[](https://go.electjon.com/page/m/177e279a/5b2c1286/3edbf2b5/25f1f4df/1770545930/VEsE/?g=_FNKN1DdY9BfCqelLAMjFg "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_2020_08_11_vp?refcode=em_2020_08_11_vp&amount=20") | | [Split $20 between Biden-Harris 2020 and Jon Ossoff now!](https://go.electjon.com/page/m/177e279a/5b2c1286/3edbf2b5/25f1f4df/1770545930/VEsF/?g=_FNKN1DdY9BfCqelLAMjFg "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_2020_08_11_vp?refcode=em_2020_08_11_vp&amount=20")
---
**Georgia is THE key battleground state in 2020.**

**Kamala even said it herself when she endorsed me last month:**

_"Jon is running to win one of the most flippable seats in the Senate. For Democrats to win a Senate majority, we have to win this seat." -- Kamala Harris_

**Friend: Winning in Georgia is going to take an unstoppable, coordinated grassroots movement, and we need your help to build it.**

**[Split a donation between the Biden-Harris campaign and my own, NOW>> ](https://go.electjon.com/page/m/177e279a/5b2c1286/3edbf2b5/25f1f4de/1770545930/VEsC/?g=_FNKN1DdY9BfCqelLAMjFg "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_2020_08_11_vp?refcode=em_2020_08_11_vp")**

name: MJ Hegar
subject: What we miss out on
disclaimer_text: Paid for by MJ for Texas
body:
COVID-19 has destroyed more than our families and economy.

|
---
[](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64891e49/7f51f7bc/40b0cb37/4ef78fe4/2277403117/VEsH/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/logo?refcode=emaillogo&amount=5")

| | Peter: COVID-19 has changed so much of life as we knew it, and here's the thing: **It didn 't have to be like this.** | [HELP ME FIX WASHINGTON](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64891e49/7f51f7bc/40b0cb37/4ef78fdb/2277403117/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjE4OTgifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-lessthan1yr?refcode=email_20200812.1nd__1898__&amount=10")
---
Pandemics, like earthquakes and hurricanes, happen. But how we prepare and how we respond makes the difference between a manageable situation and a national disaster. Our elected leaders knew about COVID-19 well before it became a global pandemic. They saw the potential for mass death and economic fallout, but instead of taking things seriously, they buried their heads in the sand and ignored the warning signs.

**Now, half a year after COVID-19 came to the United States, we 're struggling to figure out what life will look like.**

**One week from now, I would have been dropping my son off at his first day of kindergarten -- a huge milestone for our family.**

But I won't be dropping him off to his first day in the classroom like we always expected, because instead of taking necessary precautions at the outset -- issuing stay-at-home orders, ordering the manufacture of large quantities of PPE, ensuring mass testing capacity and contact tracing -- Sen. Cornyn and his buddies in Washington made jokes and told us not to worry. **They failed us, plain and simple.**

Now things are getting worse. And I'm not having it. In the military, if you see a potential problem, you get to work to nip it in the bud immediately. That's how I'm used to doing things.

**It 's never been more clear that we need real leadership in Washington. That's why I'm running for Senate. Will you help me take on Sen. Cornyn?**

body:
We can't risk having Kamala Harris in the White House. Our Constitution and country are at stake. I've already started running ads against Joe Biden and now it's time to start hitting the radical liberal Kamala Harris. But I need your help.
[](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?ms=NDMxNzk0MzYS1&kn=1&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTgyMDk5Mjc2MgS2&mt=1&rt=0)

name: Jake Duesenberg
subject: Vote Is Just Hours Away!
body:
| [ ](http://www.action4liberty.com/?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=vote_is_just_hours_away&n=1)
---
Peter \-- **The Minnesota House is supposed to vote on Ending Walz' Emergency Powers when they reconvene at noon today.** Although Speaker Hortman is starting to feel the pressure... From MinnPost: “'It is not an easy decision to stand with the governor when he’s doing hard things,' stated Speaker Hortman. And it is an election issue, especially for her members outside the Metro area who are being targeted with mailings 'that make it sound like they are single-handedly responsible for every decision the governor makes.'”
## That's your pressure! And it's working.
But Hortman, who is in a comfortable Democrat district, may be our roadblock today. How much longer is she (phone 651-296-4280) going to take her marching orders from Tim Walz? It's time Hortman takes back the power of the legislature. **Insiders at the Capitol are telling us that she might try to derail the vote to End Walz' Emergency Powers when the legislature convenes at noon! That's the only reason they have been recalled to St Paul!** Is she going to continue being a puppet for Governor Walz so he can continue exercising his illegal emergency powers? If you lost track, we're now on **Day 152 of this "emergency"**. After months of pressure, we finally have the Senate Republicans on board. And in July, we got four Democrats to break ranks in the House. **All we need to End Walz' Emergency Powers is five more rural or suburban Democrats!** We need you to contact these seven DFL legislators and tell them to stand up to Speaker Hortman and vote to End Walz' Emergency Powers on Wednesday. **Rep Rob Ecklund - 651-296-2190 /[rep.rob.ecklund@house.mn](mailto:rep.rob.ecklund@house.mn)** **Rep Jeanne Poppe - 651-296-4193 /[rep.jeanne.poppe@house.mn](mailto:rep.jeanne.poppe@house.mn)** **Rep Dan Wolgamott - 651-296-6612 /[rep.dan.wolgamott@house.mn](mailto:rep.dan.wolgamott@house.mn)** **Rep Jeff Brand - 651-296-8634 /[rep.jeff.brand@house.mn](mailto:rep.jeff.brand@house.mn)** **Rep Brad Tabke - 651-296-8872 /[rep.brad.tabke@house.mn](mailto:%20rep.brad.tabke@house.mn)********Rep Zach Stephenson - 651-296-5513 /[rep.zack.stephenson@house.mn](mailto:%20rep.zack.stephenson@house.mn)** **Rep John Persell - 651-296-5516 /[rep.john.persell@house.mn](mailto:rep.john.persell@house.mn)**
## Fill up their inboxes and phone lines with this message:
Script: Rep _______, we Minnesotans demand a vote on Walz' Emergency Powers when you convene on Wednesday. Don't let Speaker Hortman block a clean vote on the Resolution. And stop protecting Walz' Emergency Powers after 149 days. Vote YES on the Resolution. Alternate Script: Rep ________, I heard that Democrat Speaker Hortman is not going to allow a vote on the Emergency Powers this Wednesday. If that happens, I hold you responsible for it. You have a duty to vote on the Resolution according to Statute 12.31. Vote YES and don't let Democrat leadership stop a clean vote. We're still running our digital ads in their districts and thousands of mailers have already landed in mailboxes. Let's let them know they are in bad shape this November if they don't do the right thing! [](http://www.action4liberty.com/end_walz_tabke_commercial?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=vote_is_just_hours_away&n=2) **In Liberty,

** **Jake Duesenberg** **President, Action 4 Liberty**
Action 4 Liberty · United States
This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail.com](dpwillis67@gmail.com). To stop receiving emails, [click here](http://www.action4liberty.com/unsubscribe?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=vote_is_just_hours_away&n=3).
You can also keep up with Jake Duesenberg on [Facebook](http://www.action4liberty.com/r?u=27Ax0UmWOX2J8J_QwK9Z6nyVoJL5zCIi1gu8lCoYmQrA8P7rhuOjJmdy-IRmglie&e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=vote_is_just_hours_away&n=4).
Created with [NationBuilder](http://www.action4liberty.com/r?u=SWqLExi-4iBlEOa5qgO58jA2d62deOsOLwOgchKDecY&e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=vote_is_just_hours_away&n=5), software for leaders.

name: Joe Biden
subject: re: my event tonight with Kamala Harris
body:
As I hope you've heard, tonight Kamala will be joining me and 3 supporters for a post-grassroots fundraiser meet and greet. |
---
Peter --

As I hope you've heard, tonight Kamala will be joining me and 3 supporters for a post-grassroots fundraiser meet and greet.

**This is an exciting event for me, Peter.** I'm excited for Kamala and myself to have the opportunity to speak directly to some of you, answer your questions, and show all of you exactly why I picked her as my running mate.

I took a moment this morning to review who has already chipped in to this contest -- and I noticed that we're 98% of the way to our fundraising goal for the event.

[I know we'll surpass our goal, but we need a few more contributions to make it happen. \- Biden Victory Fund
Paid for by Biden Victory Fund, a joint fundraising committee authorized by Biden for President, the Democratic National Committee and the State Democratic Parties in these states: AK, AL, AZ, CO, DE, FL, GA, ID, IN, KS, KY, LA, MA, MD, ME, MI, MN, MO, MS, MT, NC, ND, NE, NH, NJ, NM, NV, NY, OH, PA, SC, TN, TX, VA, VT, WI, AND WV.
_Contributions or gifts to Biden Victory Fund are not tax deductible.

No purchase, payment, or contribution is necessary to enter or win; nor will any purchase, payment or contribution improve chances of winning. Void where prohibited. Entries must be received by August 12, 2020. Enter by contributing [**here**](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931bb7d/1cd0ac28/161dd9c0f/357e053a/475708568/VEsHAg/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kamalaandjoefundraisercontest?refcode=JB_EM_FR_2020.06.15_contest-footer_X__F1_S1_C1__all") or alternatively, **[click here](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931bb7d/1cd0ac28/161dd9c0f/357e0539/475708568/VEsHDQ/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/s/kamala-and-joe-augustfr-contest?source=JB_EM_PET_20200614_contest-footer_X__F1_S1_C1__all")** to enter without contributing. By entering you agree to be bound by the official rules governing the sweepstakes, available **[here.](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931bb7d/1cd0ac28/161dd9c0f/357e0538/475708568/VEsHDA/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/content/talk-with-kamala-and-joe-contest-rules")** Three winners will receive the following prize package: One (1) tickets to the Kamala and Joe Grassroots Fundraiser and a pre-event reception with Senator Kamala Harris and Vice President Biden. One Joe 2020 T-shirt from the Biden Victory Fund Store (approx. retail value $30). Winner will be selected by random drawing from all eligible entries to be held on or about 08/12/2020. The prize may be forfeited and awarded to an alternate eligible winner if two attempts to contact the winner by phone or email are not successful. Odds depend on number of entries received. Promotion open only to U.S. citizens, or lawful permanent U.S. residents who are legal residents of the 50 United States, District of Columbia and Puerto Rico; those 18 or older (or age of majority under applicable law); and those who would be lawfully permitted to accept the prize under applicable federal, state and local law. Sponsor: The Biden Victory Fund, 430 S Capitol St SE Washington DC 20003..

The first $5,600/$10,000 from a person/multicandidate committee ("PAC") will be allocated to Biden for President, with the first $2,800/$5,000 designated for the primary and the next $2,800/$5,000 for the general election. For contributions made after the primary, the full amount of the contribution, up to $2,800/$5,000, will be designated for the general election. The next $35,500/$15,000 from a person/PAC will be allocated to the DNC. The next $150,000/$75,000 from a person/PAC will be split equally among the Democratic state parties from: AZ, CO, FL, GA, MI, MN, NC, NE, NH, NV, OH, PA, TX, VA, and WI. The next $110,000/$55,000 from a person/PAC will be split equally among the Democratic state parties from: AL, DE, KS, LA, MA, MD, MS, NJ, NY, VT, and WV. The next $110,000/$55,000 from a person/PAC will be split equally among the Democratic state parties from: AK, ID, IN, KY, ME, MO, MT, ND, NM, SC, and TN. Any additional funds will be allocated to the DNC, subject to applicable contribution limits.

The allocation listed above may change if a contributor designates their contribution for a particular participant(s) or if following it would result in an excessive contribution. Contributions will be used in connection with federal elections, may be spent on any activity as each committee determines in its sole discretion, and will not be earmarked for any particular candidate. Federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the name, mailing address, occupation, and name of employer of individuals whose contributions exceed $200 per election cycle. _

name: =?utf-8?Q?Pat=20Hackett?=
subject: You’re invited to a special conversation with Mayor Pete.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Pat Hackett for Congress
body:
| | | | [ ](https://foundationbluemedia.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c156e612ce88db66e08a28197&id=198c3e795c&e=5886ca081d)
---
| | | [ ](https://foundationbluemedia.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c156e612ce88db66e08a28197&id=270cd26b58&e=5886ca081d)
---
| Dear Friend,

A few weeks ago, Mayor Pete Buttigieg and his _**Win the Era**_ organization endorsed our campaign for Congress. Mayor Pete agrees with and affirms what this campaign has been saying all along: We need to reclaim our voice and values in Washington.

Mayor Pete has graciously accepted our invitation to join me in an evening conversation on **August 26th from 6:00pm to 7:00pm EDT,** and I would love for you to join us. Pete and I will talk about the great challenges and opportunities that face our district and nation. At the end, we will provide an opportunity for your questions.

name: Mike Thompson
subject: We had a great time at our virtual Pasta Dinner!
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Mike Thompson For Congress [Click here to unsubscribe from Mike's email list
body:
|
---
| | Peter,

Thank you to those who were able to join us for our Napa Pasta Dinner this past weekend. We raised money for the Community Action of Napa Valley and helped support local favorites, Tre Posti and Southside Century! And a special thank you to Emma Swain and St. Supery for providing wine for our event.

I had a wonderful time chatting with everyone, and was thrilled that Speaker Nancy Pelosi, former Representative Gabby Giffords, and Representative Lauren Underwood were able to join us at the event. We had a couple more surprise guests, including an amazing performance of the National Anthem by Kayla Tavakoli. **_And, we were thrilled that Joe Biden and Adam Scott joined us to speak about the importance of voting in the upcoming elections._**

Your support means the world to this community, and we hope you enjoyed our new format, dinner at home, and virtually connecting. If you weren’t able to make our pasta dinner, don’t worry! We will have many more virtual events in the coming months.

Keep your eyes peeled for more information so you can join me in a virtual dinner while supporting local businesses. Follow us on [**_Facebook_**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/18656506/235554827/817988226?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NDQ0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxYWRlMGU4YS1kN2RjLWVhMTEtOGIwMy0wMDE1NWQwMzk0YmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ZXzTsURqgBWlTV2KKfL-EWHYDfOoPWLdPh7UnoWit6Q=&emci=19de0e8a-d7dc-ea11-8b03-00155d0394bb&emdi=1ade0e8a-d7dc-ea11-8b03-00155d0394bb&ceid=2678920) to stay up to date with what’s happening in your area.

I look forward to meeting you all and I hope you and your families are staying safe!

Thank you for your continued support,

Mike
---
|
---

name: =?utf-8?Q?Tracey=20Mann?=
subject: Sprinting to November
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mann for Congress, Inc
body:
| | |
---
| | Friends,

It’s hard to believe the primary election occurred just over a week ago. While we continue to be filled with gratitude, we have set our sites on the next mountain – the general election in November.

The Democrats have fielded a strong candidate – she raised more than $350,000 – that wants to turn the First Congressional District into a Nancy Pelosi district.

In short, I need your help to ensure the First Congressional District remains a Republican stronghold that values our conservative principles.

**_How can you help?_**
* [Make a contribution today.](https://traceymann.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=60a16ea89a176679a5f31366c&id=ee9fad6f36&e=a9d1410029) Campaigns need resources, more than any of us would like, and your contribution is one of the most steadfast ways to ensure victory on Nov 2nd.
* Let us know of activities going on in your community. We will be crisscrossing the Big First and would love to stop in at a public event near you.
* Write a letter to the editor expressing your support for our campaign.

The Big First is the beating heart of America. We must continue to be a guiding light for our conservative values and rural way of life.

Winning the November election will ensure we have representation in Congress that reflects our values. Thank you in advance for your support.

Yours in the fight,

Tracey

name: Jon Ossoff (personal)
subject: That viral photo of a Georgia high school
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JON OSSOFF FOR SENATE
body:
At least six students have tested positive for COVID-19. |
---
Friend,

Last week, two Georgia high school students posted photos on Twitter showing how their school's total disregard for public health guidelines is putting students, teachers, and families at risk.

The photos went viral, and then the students faced punishment for blowing the whistle. [](https://go.electjon.com/page/m/177e266f/5b2c1286/3edd45ae/25f1f332/841716198/VEsH/?g=_FNKN1DdY9BfCqelLAMjFg "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_2020_08_12_ga_hs?refcode=em_2020_08_12_ga_hs") **Well, after one week of in-person instruction, at least six students and three staff members at the school tested positive for COVID-19 -- and now the school's been shut down.**

Friend, first of all, we cannot accept retaliation against young people who blow the whistle when incompetent public officials jeopardize their health and the health of their families. I stand with these kids!

**This was whistleblowing. This was journalism. This was _good trouble_!**

Friend, we all want schools to reopen, but we need them to reopen safely.

_We've known for months that local school districts would need additional funding before the new school year. Instead, Senate Republicans and the White House waited until the last minute (like always), and now they're deadlocked._

**Donald Trump and Sen. David Perdue have treated this public health emergency like a political problem, rather than a historic crisis that requires strong leadership and advanced planning informed by medical expertise.**

**Their gross incompetence has led to widespread death and disease and economic devastation.**

_Their catastrophic failure cannot be rewarded with re-election. The quality of our political leadership is a matter of life and death._

**[Make a donation right now to help me hold David Perdue accountable for his lies, his self-dealing, his incompetence, and his corruption.](https://go.electjon.com/page/m/177e266f/5b2c1286/3edd45ae/25f1f332/841716198/VEsE/?g=_FNKN1DdY9BfCqelLAMjFg "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_2020_08_12_ga_hs?refcode=em_2020_08_12_ga_hs")**

_If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_

name: =?utf-8?Q?The=20White=20House?=
subject: Fall School Closure = Long-Term Health, Learning Costs for Kids
body:
"At what point do our public health interventions themselves cause a public health crisis?” biostatistics professor Christina Ramirez writes | | | | [ ](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=3d9138c585&e=3ee4985eea)
---
| | |
# **Fall School Closure = Long-Term Health, Learning Costs for Kids**

“At what point do our public health interventions themselves cause a public health crisis?” biostatistics professor Christina Ramirez writes in _RealClearPolitics_.

“Failure to reopen schools in the fall will inflict greater hardship and potentially life-long developmental deficits on our most vulnerable children and grandchildren long after this pandemic has faded–a tragically ironic victimization of those least at risk of morbidity and mortality. If kids are indeed our future, we must find a way to reopen the schools.”

[Click here to read more.](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=354586a500&e=3ee4985eea)

🎬 **WATCH LIVE at 3 p.m. ET** : [**President Trump participates in Kids First—Getting America’s Children Safely Back to School**](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=d9448983ad&e=3ee4985eea)
---
|
---
| “President Donald Trump on Tuesday announced the U.S. government will purchase 100 million doses of Moderna’s experimental coronavirus vaccine, which is currently in late-stage human trials,” Noah Higgins-Dunn reports. “We are investing in the development and manufacture of the top six vaccine candidates to ensure rapid delivery. The military is ready to go, they’re ready to deliver a vaccine to Americans as soon as one is fully approved by the FDA,” President Trump said. Read more in [CNBC](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=53635c10d0&e=3ee4985eea).
---
|
---
| “On Monday Carmen Best shocked Seattle by resigning as police chief. It was her last act of public service, coming hours after the City Council voted 7-1 to cut money and jobs from its police force—which members make clear is only a first step in dismantling local law enforcement . . . In the name of Black Lives Matter the progressives in Seattle have now pushed out a black police chief,” [_The Wall Street Journal_](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=428893cd1b&e=3ee4985eea) editorial board writes.
---
|
---
| This week, “ten U.S. Government agencies and departments presented detailed plans on how they would leverage their unique capabilities to remove legal and regulatory barriers to women’s full and free participation in the global economy. These plans build upon progress already made under the Women’s Global Development and Prosperity (W-GDP) Initiative,” Ivanka Trump and National Security Adviser Robert O’Brien write for [CNBC](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=c2d01921d8&e=3ee4985eea).
---
|

[Privacy Policy](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=2b5ac1b8be&e=3ee4985eea) | [Contact the White House](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=c8b8379cbd&e=3ee4985eea) | [Unsubscribe](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=8cafb01033&e=3ee4985eea&c=d45dc4b159)
---
| | | The White House * 1600 Pennsylvania Ave NW * Washington, DC 20500 * USA · 202-456-1111
---

So let's get to work and help them set a huge gr | | | [](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/2852503a/45c30650/1c2e2be9f/66e802e0/2097938132/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVm1hWEp6ZEc1aGJXVWxKUT09IjoiIiwiSlNWc1lYTjBibUZ0WlNVbCI6IiIsIkpTVjZhWEFsSlE9PSI6IjE4MzI2In0%3D/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://elizabethwarren.com?source=em-header&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&zip=18326")
---
I've known Kamala Harris for a long time -- from when she took on Wall Street during the financial crisis as attorney general to working for the people every day as a United States senator.

Throughout her career, she has been unafraid, and an inspiration to millions of women who see themselves in her. As our vice presidential nominee, Kamala is making history.

She'll be a great partner to Joe Biden in making our government a powerful force for good in the fight for social, racial, and economic justice.

**I will do everything I can to ensure Joe Biden and Kamala Harris are elected in November so they can get big things done for the American people starting January 2021.**

And right now, all eyes are on how many grassroots donations the Biden-Harris campaign will receive in the first 24 hours after this historic announcement. So let's get to work and help them set a huge grassroots fundraising record.

**[If you're able to, please make a contribution of $2 or whatever you can chip in to help elect Joe Biden and Kamala Harris as the next president and vice president of the United States. Let's show them that we're in this fight right by their side.](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/2852503a/45c30650/1c2e2be9f/66e802e7/2097938132/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsImUzc2dkWEpzSUgxOSI6IndkLWpiIiwiZTNzZ2NtVm1ZMjlrWlNCOWZRPT0iOiJFTVUwNEZfRUdSX0VXRF9FXzIwMjAwODEyX1YxUzJfUCJ9/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://secure.elizabethwarren.com/donate/wd-jb?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=EMU04F_EGR_EWD_E_20200812_V1S2_P")**

Thanks for being a part of this,

Cornyn has not represented Texas. | [DONATE FOR A SENATOR TO REPRESENT TEXAS](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64891e4a/7f51f7bc/40b75cd0/4ef78fc8/2564232922/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjE5MDMifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-cornyn-retirement-fund?refcode=email_20200812.2nd__1903__&amount=10")

While **corporate PACs, the Koch network, Big Pharma, and the NRA** are spending millions to keep him in office, it's clear that **everyday Texans don 't want him there**. With only a **29% approval rating**, it's time for Sen. Cornyn to retire.

I will fight for **workers ' rights**, for **criminal justice reform** , for **expanded access to health care** , for **a safer world for our kids** , and most importantly, **I 'll fight for you**. It's high time we elect a fighter to represent Texas in the U.S. Senate, and we've got a Texas-sized grassroots team ready to retire Sen. Cornyn.

**So what do you say, Peter, are you with me?**

We know that this could all come down to Florida, and the turnout in our election here in the 16th District could tilt the state in our favor and determine who becomes our next president.

Margaret

name: staff@maggiehassan.com
subject: Petition to save the Post Office
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Maggie for NH
body:
Hi there, we need to touch base about what's happening with the Postal Service.
Trump's handpicked Postmaster General, Louis DeJoy, is making massive changes that are creating mail delays across the country.
Millions of Americans - including rural Granite Staters -- rely on timely mail for everything from paychecks and prescriptions to groceries and letters. And amid COVID-19, many Americans are relying on vote-by-mail to cast their ballots.
This is a disaster, everyone, and we need to address it. [**Please sign our petition to demand that Congress take action to address mail delivery issues and save the Postal Service.**](https://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fc5f7/2a380d31/23417261/f0a6da/693929482/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZHU1ZKVFZFNUJUVVVsSlE9PSI6IiIsIkpTVk1RVk5VVGtGTlJTVWwiOiIiLCJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVmFTVkFsSlE9PSI6IjAzMjY0In0%3D/?g=YHsLejpTVzRXNXNZdVQ0tHA "https://act.maggiehassan.com/page/s/202008_USPS?source=e20200812_usps1_na&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=03264")
Donald Trump and his administration continue to put politics over the well-being of American people. We can't let him get away with it.
**We really need 173 signatures from 03264 to send a message that the Postal Service must get back up and running efficiently.[Will you please sign?](https://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fc5f7/2a380d31/23417261/f0a6da/693929482/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZHU1ZKVFZFNUJUVVVsSlE9PSI6IiIsIkpTVk1RVk5VVGtGTlJTVWwiOiIiLCJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVmFTVkFsSlE9PSI6IjAzMjY0In0%3D/?g=YHsLejpTVzRXNXNZdVQ0tHA "https://act.maggiehassan.com/page/s/202008_USPS?source=e20200812_usps1_na&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=03264")**
Thank you for taking action!
Team Maggie
> [Contribute](https://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fc5f7/2a380d31/23417261/f0a6db/693929482/VEsF/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoiaGFzc2FuX2dlbmVyYWwiLCJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6ImUyMDIwMDgxMl91c3BzX25hIiwiZTNzZ1RGQkJRVkYxWlhKNVUzUnlhVzVuSUgxOSI6IjMsMjUsNTAsMTAwLDI1MCJ9/?g=YHsLejpTVzRXNXNZdVQ0tHA "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/hassan_general?refcode=e20200812_usps_na&amounts=3,25,50,100,250")

This campaign is about building a progressive movement of working people, not corporate special interests. That’s why so many strong progressive voices are behind Mondaire -- they know they can count on him to be a leader in our fight. If you’re for policies like Medicare for All and a Green New Deal, which will radically improve the lives of working people, you belong on Team Mondaire. name: Jay Inslee
subject: Some facts on my opponent
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JAY INSLEE FOR WASHINGTON (D)
body:
We can't sit back -- we have to fight back.
| [](https://act.jayinslee.com/go/8912?t=3&akid=8121%2E868730%2EvmyNaW) Friend, We officially have an opponent -- and we should be ready to fight back with everything we've got against Loren Culp. Here's why:
1. While I've been fighting to protect Washingtonians' public health and safety every single day, he has argued masks aren't necessary. Why? Because he's been **"meeting and greeting people, handshakes, hugs, talking to thousands of people every day."** Let's be clear, if this is true, he could be threatening the public safety of thousands.
2. As governor, he said he'd **oppose a mask mandate** and would follow the lead of states like Florida (where recent outbreaks have devastated the state).
3. He would recklessly **reopen everything from schools to restaurants to music venues**.
4. And he tweets things that sound _too familiar_ , like**a tweet citing a misleading study claiming vote-by-mail is "not effective."** As we've seen as recently as last week in Washington state, that is a dangerous lie.

He's a Donald Trump clone through and through, and he wants to run Washington state just like Donald Trump runs our country. People may say he's not a "serious candidate," but -- well, look who is sitting in the White House -- we cannot take any opponent for granted, including Loren Culp. **The race to Election Day starts now, and with the Republican Governors Association's war chest overflowing ready to back up my opponent, we have to be ready:[We set an aggressive mid-month deadline goal to raise $25,000 by Friday at midnight. Will you chip in $5 or more right now to fight back against my new right-wing opponent?](https://act.jayinslee.com/go/10619?t=4&akid=8121%2E868730%2EvmyNaW)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [$5 →](https://act.jayinslee.com/go/10620?t=5&akid=8121%2E868730%2EvmyNaW)

Jay

name: =?utf-8?Q?Mace=20Fundraising=20Team?=
subject: re: Biden’s VP announcement
body:
Yesterday, Joe Biden finally announced his VP pick and I couldn’t be less surprised by his choice. He called on progressive Senator Kamala Harris... | | | [View In Your Browser](https://mailchi.mp/nancymace/how-we-flip-the-house-2088354?e=f1831b4ca2) [Forward To A Friend](http://us7.forward-to-friend.com/forward?u=8ef1646525944f29311be74d4&id=c9bd4953ed&e=f1831b4ca2)
---
| | [](https://nancymace.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=8ef1646525944f29311be74d4&id=573d7ba65a&e=f1831b4ca2)
---
| Friend - did you see the news?
**Yesterday, Joe Biden finally announced his VP pick and I couldn’t be less surprised by his choice. **

_He called on progressive Senator Kamala Harris — a former 2020 nominee who has proved time and time again that she is WAY out of touch with South Carolina voters. She’s a California liberal and one of the most radical and partisan members of the Senate. _

**_In fact, she has the most liberal record in the Senate. That’s right, her voting record is even more progressive and radical than Bernie Sanders, Elizabeth Warren, and Corey Booker. _**

Voters already rejected her once and she represents exactly what’s wrong with the left. She’s a big government, tax and spend liberal who wants to impose her progressive values on every town, city, and county in America.

**It’s a simple fact — a Joe Biden and Kamala Harris ticket is totally out of step with South Carolina voters. **

_You can bet the house (no pun intended) that my opponent would do everything to support a progressive Biden and Harris agenda. That would be a disaster for the Lowcountry and South Carolina as a whole. _

**This is why the stakes are so high in 2020. We need to push back up and down the ballot —[can I count on you?](https://nancymace.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=8ef1646525944f29311be74d4&id=37f79909d5&e=f1831b4ca2)**

_Grassroots donors are the key to pushing back on progressives like my opponent, and I won’t be able to win my race without you. Will you support my campaign by donating any amount below? _

[Chip in and support my campaign >>>](https://nancymace.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=8ef1646525944f29311be74d4&id=72d55e02d0&e=f1831b4ca2)

Thank you for your support,

Nancy Mace

clean_body: | | | Team, Vice President Biden has made an excellent choice in selecting Senator Kamala Harris as his running mate. Harris has a record of action on economic justice, equality, health care, climate change, consumer protection, voting rights, and gun violence prevention. There’s nothing Kamala can’t do—she’s shown us she can lead. She has vision and character and grit. We are looking forward to her leadership in the Biden-Harris Administration. But we also know the next 10 weeks won’t be easy. As soon as the news about Kamala broke yesterday afternoon, the Trump campaign went up with a negative ad against her and Biden. They’re going to fight us, and fight dirty, every step of the way to November with everything they’ve got. = = The Biden-Harris team is ready to pull our country out of the mess we’re in, and they have the political and policy chops to do so. Now it’s our job to help them get to the White House. We hope you’ll join us in supporting the Biden-Harris ticket and Democrats up and down the ballot in November.
