name: Ted Cruz
subject: ** Send a TEXAS SHERIFF to Congress! **
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Nehls for Congress
body:
🚨 Stand with Sheriff Troy Nehls. Our nation needs his law & order leadership in the U.S. House! Read more >>
Friend, _Are you fed up with watching Antifa radicals DESTROY American cities and monuments?_

_Have you had enough of these attacks against our police?_

Today, you can do something about it.

**JOIN ME in standing with Sheriff Troy Nehls, our Republican candidate running in TX-22**. **[>> Let’s send a TEXAS SHERIFF to Congress on November 3rd! <<](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/5154cae44487eae0041ad8cde91a9694/35193/86edc2d1beb90a92/a6dcaab6d27722c2c3d6b838967d376c/35193)**
Troy Nehls is a proud family man who has dedicated his life to public service. At 19 years old, Troy enlisted in the U.S. Army reserve. He served for 21 years, leading troops into combat on deployments to Iraq and Afghanistan–earning two Bronze Stars before retiring with the rank of major.

Back home in Texas, Troy began a career in law enforcement in the early 1990s. He has served Texans a total of 28 years in various law enforcement roles. In 2012, he was elected Fort Bend County Sheriff and was re-elected as Sheriff in 2016. [ ](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/5154cae44487eae0041ad8cde91a9694/35193/86edc2d1beb90a92/a0b979a3227cfeccc3d6b838967d376c/35193) Now, Sheriff Troy Nehls is running for Congress to stand up for our Texas values, help build a strong and secure America, and lead the fight to BACK THE BLUE in Washington!

This is a must-win race, and I could not be more proud to stand with Troy.

[**Join Sheriff Troy Nehls’ campaign team today with a $5, $10, $25, or $50 contribution**.](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/5154cae44487eae0041ad8cde91a9694/35193/86edc2d1beb90a92/f10d86ca64e27ccac3d6b838967d376c/35193)

Help send an AMERICAN PATRIOT and TEXAS LAWMAN to Congress! [🚨 Stand with Sheriff Nehls >>](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/5154cae44487eae0041ad8cde91a9694/35193/86edc2d1beb90a92/289a154686f12e8bc3d6b838967d376c/35193) I’ve been reaching out to conservatives across America about our fight to Keep Texas “RED” in 2020. Our nation’s future is on the line here in the Lone Star State.

The Democrats are DESPERATE to win our 38 electoral votes and the polls show it’s a dead heat. They’re targeting Senator Cornyn, as well as a number of Republican-held U.S. House seats to protect Nancy Pelosi’s grip on power.

This open seat in TX-22 is exactly what I’ve been taking about...

The DCCC has made this “Toss-Up” race a TOP target of their “Red to Blue” program.

You know they don’t want a Texas Sheriff standing for law and order in Congress.

I can only imagine the types of attacks the DCCC and radical-left groups are planning to launch against Troy during the critical weeks ahead.

I hope conservatives across America will have his back in this fight.

**[Help send Troy to Congress. Join him in the fight to keep this seat and Texas “RED” on November 3rd!](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/5154cae44487eae0041ad8cde91a9694/35193/86edc2d1beb90a92/1e1e75701119f0d9c3d6b838967d376c/35193) **

Thank you in advance for ANY donation you can rush to the Nehls for Congress campaign.

For Liberty, [ ](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/5154cae44487eae0041ad8cde91a9694/35193/86edc2d1beb90a92/686a0ddf3e322a3ac3d6b838967d376c/35193) Ted Cruz

P.S. We need Sheriff Nehls in Congress, to lead the charge against the extreme-left's organized violence against law enforcement. [**Take a stand today**.](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/5154cae44487eae0041ad8cde91a9694/35193/86edc2d1beb90a92/533633cc53f6c484c3d6b838967d376c/35193) [🚨 Join Sheriff Nehls’ Team! Donate $5 >>](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/5154cae44487eae0041ad8cde91a9694/35193/86edc2d1beb90a92/c6faea588e01178ec3d6b838967d376c/35193) [🚨 Join Sheriff Nehls’ Team! Donate $10 >>](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/5154cae44487eae0041ad8cde91a9694/35193/86edc2d1beb90a92/e2285193f261f3ddc3d6b838967d376c/35193) [🚨 Join Sheriff Nehls’ Team! Donate $25 >>](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/5154cae44487eae0041ad8cde91a9694/35193/86edc2d1beb90a92/2a6b351d3aeb740bc3d6b838967d376c/35193) [🚨 Join Sheriff Nehls’ Team! Donate $50 >>](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/5154cae44487eae0041ad8cde91a9694/35193/86edc2d1beb90a92/739aa6212b7a17d4c3d6b838967d376c/35193) [🚨 Join Sheriff Nehls’ Team! Donate $100 >>](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/5154cae44487eae0041ad8cde91a9694/35193/86edc2d1beb90a92/5dbd62c7856e92f7c3d6b838967d376c/35193) | | [](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/5154cae44487eae0041ad8cde91a9694/35193/86edc2d1beb90a92/ca6a3f8652d01758c3d6b838967d376c/35193) | [](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/5154cae44487eae0041ad8cde91a9694/35193/86edc2d1beb90a92/b5dc920a183bc378c3d6b838967d376c/35193)

name: Tiffany Shedd
subject: Illegal Criminals > Police?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tiffany Shedd for Congress Committee
body:
Tom really voted for that. Friends, Tom O’Halleran voted to prioritize illegal immigrants over Arizonans. He voted to give $15 million of our tax dollars to provide free American legal counsel to illegal immigrants at our Southern border. He voted against additional funding for state, local, and tribal law enforcement grants, mental health support for first responders, and drug treatment programs. It has been an honor to meet so many patriots throughout this campaign. I look forward to meeting many of you at the polls on election day.

God bless,
Kat

clean_body: You don't want to miss this. | | | | | | | == | | | == | | | | Trail Update | Friends, It was a busy week in the district for me and the team as we gear up for election day in less than a week. == I was proud to join the Trump Team and meet with President Trump's first campaign manager, Corey Lewandowski, at the Marion County Trump Victory Center. | | == | == | I have been extremely busy over the past few days making phone calls and building signs. It was a welcome surprise when my husband Matt brought Blu the chicken, one of the stars from the commercials, to say hello! It has been an honor to meet so many patriots throughout this campaign. I look forward to meeting many of you at the polls on election day. | Please remember to vote on Tuesday or drop off your absentee ballot to make sure that YOUR voice is heard. Remind your friends and family to vote too - every vote can make a difference on Tuesday God bless, Kat | Building Team Kat | | Mayor Jordan Marlowe of the City of Newberry supports me because he knows that I will fight for our rights on Capitol Hill. As the wife of a firefighter/SWAT Medic, they trust that I will fight for law enforcement and first responders on Capitol Hill. name: Kamala Harris
subject: re: joining this team
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Biden for President
body:
I hope you'll let me tell you why I'm so proud to be teaming up with Joe, and what drives me each day in our fight to build an America that works for all its people. |
---
Peter --

**I 'm honored to be joining Joe Biden and this team in the fight for the soul of our country as his running mate. It's so great to meet you.**

I'm about to ask you to [**say you 're in to do whatever it takes to win the White House this year,**](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931bb75/1cd0ac28/1610d024a/357e012e/1310352598/VEsH/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "http://go.joebiden.com/page/s/all-in-for-the-biden-harris-ticket?source=JB_EM_PET_2020.08.12_B2_KDH_X__F1_S1_C1__full&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bsd&utm_campaign=JB_EM_PET_2020.08.12_B2_KDH_X__F1_S1_C1__full") and then I hope you'll let me introduce myself and tell you why I'm so proud to be teaming up with Joe, and what drives me each day in our fight. | [I'M ALL IN >>](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931bb75/1cd0ac28/1610d024a/357e012d/1310352598/VEsE/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/s/all-in-for-the-biden-harris-ticket?source=JB_EM_PET_2020.08.12_B2_KDH_X__F1_S1_C1__full&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bsd&utm_campaign=JB_EM_PET_2020.08.12_B2_KDH_X__F1_S1_C1__full")
---
My mom and dad, like so many other immigrants, came to this country for an education. Mom, from India. Dad, from Jamaica. And the Civil Rights movement of the 1960s brought them together.

That spirit of activism is why my mom, Shyamala, would always tell my sister and me, "Don't just sit around and complain about things. _Do something._ "

That's why I became a District Attorney and fought to fix a broken system from within. Why I served as California's Attorney General. Why I'm proud to represent my state as a U.S. Senator. **And it 's why, today, I'm humbled to be joining Joe Biden in the battle to defeat Donald Trump and build a country that lives up to our values of truth, equality, and justice.**

I've never been more ready to roll up my sleeves and get to work -- but Joe and I will need you in our corner too, Peter. Which is why I'm asking you to commit to being in this fight alongside me:

**Are you in to do whatever it takes to win the White House this year? Joe and I may be the names at the top of the ticket, but the fight to restore the soul of our nation -- the values we cherish and the truths we hold -- will be won or lost by all of us. We need you with us:**
[I'M ALL IN >>](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931bb75/1cd0ac28/1610d024a/357e012d/1310352598/VEsF/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/s/all-in-for-the-biden-harris-ticket?source=JB_EM_PET_2020.08.12_B2_KDH_X__F1_S1_C1__full&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bsd&utm_campaign=JB_EM_PET_2020.08.12_B2_KDH_X__F1_S1_C1__full")
---
I know that winning this race will be a tougher challenge than any I've faced in my lifetime, but make no mistake, Peter: I'm not afraid of Donald Trump. I've been standing up to Trump and people like him for my entire career. He doesn't scare me.

He's tried to rip health care away from Americans, but I've fought to defend the Affordable Care Act.

He founded a for-profit college that scammed students out of their dreams, and I sued for-profit schools to hold them accountable.

He's a serial predator. I've spent my career putting them away.

He's given tax breaks to big corporations, but I won $25 billion for homeowners across California who'd been defrauded. I took on that fight alongside my dear friend, Beau Biden. Beau was a good man, and he left us far too soon. But I got to see him practice what his dad had taught him: Dignity and decency -- and putting your family and your country above everything else.

**Donald Trump thinks this country belongs to him. But Joe Biden knows it belongs to all of us._To the people._ Together, the people are going to take it back -- but only if every single person on this team steps up to join Joe Biden and me in our campaign:**

[**Say you 're in to join Joe Biden and me in the fight for an America that works on behalf of all its people. I couldn't be prouder to be joining the ticket today as the Democratic Vice Presidential Nominee, and we're counting on you to be a part of this race too.**](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931bb75/1cd0ac28/1610d024a/357e012e/1310352598/VEsC/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "http://go.joebiden.com/page/s/all-in-for-the-biden-harris-ticket?source=JB_EM_PET_2020.08.12_B2_KDH_X__F1_S1_C1__full&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bsd&utm_campaign=JB_EM_PET_2020.08.12_B2_KDH_X__F1_S1_C1__full")

Yours in the fight,

Kamala

[DONATE](https://go.joebiden.?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "http://secure.actblue.com/donate/biden2020_fr_q32020?refcode=JB_EM_PET_2020.08.12_B2_KDH_X__F1_S1_C1__full&amount=&amounts=,,,&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&addr1=%0A&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bsd&utm_campaign=JB_EM_PET_2020.08.12_B2_KDH_X__F1_S1_C1__full")

We know we send a lot of emails, and we are sorry about that. The reason? We are relying on grassroots supporters like you (we're serious!).

But Peter, we don't want to bother you. If you'd like to only receive our most important emails, [click here](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931bb75/1cd0ac28/1610d024a/357e0125/1310352598/VEsHAw/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/s/less-emails"). clean_body: I hope you'll let me tell you why I'm so proud to be teaming up with Joe, and what drives me each day in our fight to build an America that works for all its people. | Peter -- I 'm honored to be joining Joe Biden and this team in the fight for the soul of our country as his running mate. It's so great to meet you. I'm about to ask you to "" and then I hope you'll let me introduce myself and tell you why I'm so proud to be teaming up with Joe, and what drives me each day in our fight. | "" My mom and dad, like so many other immigrants, came to this country for an education. Mom, from India. Dad, from Jamaica. And the Civil Rights movement of the 1960s brought them together. That spirit of activism is why my mom, Shyamala, would always tell my sister and me, "Don't just sit around and complain about things. Do something. " That's why I became a District Attorney and fought to fix a broken system from within. Why I served as California's Attorney General. Why I'm proud to represent my state as a U.S. Senator. And it 's why, today, I'm humbled to be joining Joe Biden in the battle to defeat Donald Trump and build a country that lives up to our values of truth, equality, and justice. I've never been more ready to roll up my sleeves and get to work -- but Joe and I will need you in our corner too, Peter. Which is why I'm asking you to commit to being in this fight alongside me: Are you in to do whatever it takes to win the White House this year? Joe and I may be the names at the top of the ticket, but the fight to restore the soul of our nation -- the values we cherish and the truths we hold -- will be won or lost by all of us. We need you with us: "" I know that winning this race will be a tougher challenge than any I've faced in my lifetime, but make no mistake, Peter: I'm not afraid of Donald Trump. I've been standing up to Trump and people like him for my entire career. He doesn't scare me. He's tried to rip health care away from Americans, but I've fought to defend the Affordable Care Act. | Patriot,
Joe Biden thinks we forgot about the 8 years he spent in the White House as Vice President. Obama's White House moved America backward and inspired the MAGA revolution that we are a part of today.
The Obama White House put America last for 8 years. And we have no doubt that electing Joe Biden in November will lead to an Obama White House 2.0.

subject: Our 2A rights are in danger
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Indiana Republican Party
body:
Indiana’s Attorney General election is going to be a tight race — and may determine our Second Amendment rights! Read more >> | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/indiana/thankful-469626?e=1acd9bb3d6)
---
| | [ ](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=f6ea9fec9c&e=1acd9bb3d6)
---
id:2020-04-23-15:43:59:705t
---
| Hoosier Republican,

_We can’t stress enough how important it is that conservatives in Indiana band together to support Todd Rokita for Attorney General._

**The Democrats are targeting this race, along with several other attorneys general elections across the country. They have made these races an absolutely critical priority because they KNOW that that they can use them to go after President Trump and Vice President Pence.**

Not only that, but if the anti-gun coastal elites manage to take over attorney generals’ offices in the heartland, **_they’ll try to follow the attorney general’s lead in New York and prosecute conservative organizations like the NRA!_**

With all the turmoil in today’s political environment, do you want Washington bureaucrats to take away your right to defend your family and loved ones?

**Todd Rokita has a proven, A-rated record in defending our Constitution’s Second Amendment. He will fight for Hoosiers’ God-given, constitutionally-protected rights, and defend the president’s agenda.**

Todd is the common-sense conservative that we need as our next attorney general.

Todd’s Democrat opponent is well-funded, and he’s got “C” rating from the NRA, which begs the question – does he support the New York attorney general’s attack on the Second Amendment, too?

We know where Todd stands.

As we gear up for the election in November, we need to put as many resources behind Todd as we can to defeat the liberal machine that is already at work in Indiana.

Will you donate now to elect Todd Rokita and protect our Second Amendment rights?
[**_Chip in $10 to protect 2A rights in Indiana!_**](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=a975a519c8&e=1acd9bb3d6)

[**_Chip in $25 to protect 2A rights in Indiana!_**](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=c3d99734f0&e=1acd9bb3d6)

[**_Chip in $50 to protect 2A rights in Indiana!_**](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=d4713b8ccf&e=1acd9bb3d6)

[**_Chip in $100 to protect 2A rights in Indiana!_**](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=6ca4655917&e=1acd9bb3d6)

[**_Chip in $150 to protect 2A rights in Indiana!_**](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=23368d7201&e=1acd9bb3d6)

[**_Chip in another amount to protect 2A rights in Indiana!_**](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=77e896ce11&e=1acd9bb3d6)
We can’t let Nancy Pelosi and her minions win this race with a rubber-stamp candidate who will do nothing but her bidding. Hoosiers deserve better than that.

Please take a stand for conservative values and donate today to make sure we win big for Todd this November!

Thanks for your support,

The Indiana GOP

Not only that, but if the anti-gun coastal elites manage to take over attorney generals’ offices in the heartland, they’ll try to follow the attorney general’s lead in New York and prosecute conservative organizations like the NRA! With all the turmoil in today’s political environment, do you want Washington bureaucrats to take away your right to defend your family and loved ones? Todd Rokita has a proven, A-rated record in defending our Constitution’s Second Amendment. He will fight for Hoosiers’ God-given, constitutionally-protected rights, and defend the president’s agenda. Todd is the common-sense conservative that we need as our next attorney general. Todd’s Democrat opponent is well-funded, and he’s got “C” rating from the NRA, which begs the question – does he support the New York attorney general’s attack on the Second Amendment, too? We know where Todd stands. As we gear up for the election in November, we need to put as many resources behind Todd as we can to defeat the liberal machine that is already at work in Indiana. Will you donate now to elect Todd Rokita and protect our Second Amendment rights? We can’t let Nancy Pelosi and her minions win this race with a rubber-stamp candidate who will do nothing but her bidding. Hoosiers deserve better than that. Please take a stand for conservative values and donate today to make sure we win big for Todd this November! Thanks for your support, The Indiana GOP | "Protect 2A rights in Indiana! >>" | | id:2020-04-28-19:45:12:543t | | | | | | | | | | | Copyright © 2020 Indiana Republican State Committee, Inc., All rights reserved.

name: Stacey Abrams
subject: Have you gotten your Fair Fight purple VOTE mask?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fair Fight PAC, www
body:
We've partnered with Resistance By Design to create masks that will help keep people healthy and encourage them to vote |
---
[](https://secure.fairfightaction.com/page/m/41efa451/34a064cc/1be2c49c/702e3ae/376812139/VEsH/?g=yzW-IFH8x8VbBlZb5iRRXGA "https://fairfight.com/")

| | | Friend - Wearing a mask is one simple yet extremely important thing we can all do to help prevent the spread of COVID-19. [**Fair Fight has partnered with Resistance By Design to produce purple VOTE masks**](https://secure.fairfightaction.com/page/m/41efa451/34a064cc/1be2c49c/702e3af/376812139/VEsE/?g=yzW-IFH8x8VbBlZb5iRRXGA "https://www.resistancebydesign.com/fair-fight") to help get people out to vote, keep voters safe, and remind us all of what's at stake this election. [](https://secure.fairfightaction.com/page/m/41efa451/34a064cc/1be2c49c/702e3af/376812139/VEsF/?g=yzW-IFH8x8VbBlZb5iRRXGA "https://www.resistancebydesign.com/fair-fight") I'm not the only one talking about these masks, though. **[Mark Ruffalo](https://secure.fairfightaction.com/page/m/41efa451/34a064cc/1be2c49c/702e3ac/376812139/VEsC/?g=yzW-IFH8x8VbBlZb5iRRXGA "https://twitter.com/MarkRuffalo/status/1291449636033630209")** , **[Laura Linney](https://secure.fairfightaction.com/page/m/41efa451/34a064cc/1be2c49c/702e3ad/376812139/VEsD/?g=yzW-IFH8x8VbBlZb5iRRXGA "https://www.instagram.com/p/CDjs786j2xI/")** , **[Megan Rapinoe](https://secure.fairfightaction.com/page/m/41efa451/34a064cc/1be2c49c/702e3aa/376812139/VEsA/?g=yzW-IFH8x8VbBlZb5iRRXGA "https://www.instagram.com/p/CDj4eyvnbAD/?hl=en")** , **[Ludacris](https://secure.fairfightaction.com/page/m/41efa451/34a064cc/1be2c49c/702e3ab/376812139/VEsB/?g=yzW-IFH8x8VbBlZb5iRRXGA "https://twitter.com/Ludacris/status/1291454352272621568")** , and many more friends of Fair Fight all shared pictures of themselves in their masks and pledged their support in our fight for free and fair elections.

With only **83 more days until Election Day** , now more than ever it is critical every eligible voter is able to have their voice heard and their vote counted. Fair Fight has been working hard to make sure elections are free and fair for all, but with the threat of COVID-19 still very real, we also have to make sure they are safe.

[**Will you support Fair Fight 's work by purchasing a purple VOTE mask from Resistance By Design today? Fair Fight will also be donating a portion of the proceeds from these sales to the Southern Center for Human Rights, which works for equality, dignity, and justice for people impacted by the criminal legal system in the Deep South.**](https://secure.fairfightaction.com/page/m/41efa451/34a064cc/1be2c49c/702e3af/376812139/VEsO/?g=yzW-IFH8x8VbBlZb5iRRXGA "https://www.resistancebydesign.com/fair-fight")

Thank you for your support of safe and accessible voting amid COVID-19. I hope you will join us in the fight to protect democracy. -Stacey [Get Your Mask](https://secure.fairfightaction.com/page/m/41efa451/34a064cc/1be2c49c/702e3af/376812139/VEsP/?g=yzW-IFH8x8VbBlZb5iRRXGA "https://www.resistancebydesign.com/fair-fight")
---

|

name: Kathy Manning
subject: A historic moment for our country →
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kathy Manning for Congress
body:
How we honor the legacy of John Lewis and the Voting Rights Act:
|
---

| | **USA Today: "Voting Rights Act was John Lewis' life's work. 55 years later, minority voter suppression remains"** This is a major moment in American history -- this month marks the 55th anniversary of the Voting Rights Act. Shortly after Rep. John Lewis led courageous marchers across the Edmund Pettus Bridge in Selma, fighting for the voting rights of Black Americans, President Lyndon B. Johnson signed the VRA into law. This monumental piece of legislation was a direct result of the hard work and "good trouble" of Rep. Lewis and other civil rights heroes. The Voting Rights Act outlawed voter discrimination of the Jim Crow South. Unfortunately, in 2013, the Supreme Court struck down key provisions of the VRA and paved the way for discrimination at the ballot box to resume in earnest in the form of restrictive laws and voter suppression -- including here in North Carolina, where Republican lawmakers pursued multiple avenues for reinstating voter suppression, from Voter ID laws to closing voting locations in African American areas, to eliminating early voting on Sundays, when Black voters often went in large groups to vote after church. And today, the coronavirus pandemic -- which disproportionately affects communities of color -- poses even more hurdles to the ballot box with new threats to voters' health when casting ballots in person. [_**ADD YOUR NAME: RESTORE, EXPAND, AND PROTECT VOTING RIGHTS -> **_](https://secure.kathymanningfornc.com/page/m/18d9d293/3d199a51/2fab8bc2/7364aa8f/4207209218/VEsH/?g=Bm8FRTjfd5ld5gouxTH21cA "https://secure.kathymanningfornc.com/e200812pet_ns") Last year, the House passed the Voting Rights Advancement Act, which was recently renamed the John Lewis Voting Rights Act in Rep. Lewis' honor. This important measure would restore the VRA to its full intended purpose and expand voting rights for all -- including expanding voting by mail, an urgent action we must take before the November election. **Here 's the problem: Mitch McConnell is blocking the John Lewis Voting Rights Act in the Senate.** I'm fighting to make sure all North Carolinians' voices are heard on Election Day, but I need you to stand with me. [_**Will you add your name to mine and call on McConnell to honor John Lewis ' legacy by taking action to restore, expand, and protect voting rights? **_](https://secure.kathymanningfornc.com/page/m/18d9d293/3d199a51/2fab8bc2/7364aa8f/4207209218/VEsE/?g=Bm8FRTjfd5ld5gouxTH21cA "https://secure.kathymanningfornc.com/e200812pet_ns") Thank you, Kathy |
---
| | Paid for by Kathy Manning for Congress
---

| | Paid for by Kathy Manning for Congress
---

name: =?utf-8?B?TGluZGEgU8OhbmNoZXo=?=
subject: we should all be wearing masks
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Stand with Sánchez |
body:
I'll keep this quick -

Masks are an effective, inexpensive, and relatively unobtrusive way to slow to spread of COVID-19.

Masks are not a violation of someone's freedom.

As we attempt to reopen our economy and get back to everyday life, masks should be integral for everyone. That's why I'm calling on President Trump to sign a national mask mandate to help slow the spread of COVID-19 and protect our most vulnerable.

Will you stand with me by adding your name and calling for a national mask mandate?

Thanks for taking action,

-- Linda Sánchez

----------------------------------------
| Paid for by Stand with Sánchez |
----------------------------------------

Stand with Sánchez
415 New Jersey Avenue, SE - Unit 1
Washington DC 20003 United States

Thanks for taking action, -- Linda Sánchez | Paid for by Stand with Sánchez | Stand with Sánchez 415 New Jersey Avenue, SE - Unit 1 Washington DC 20003 United States If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please =. p.p1 {margin: 0.0px 0.0px 0.0px 0.0px; font: 12.0px 'Helvetica Neue'}

name: Jon Ossoff (iPhone)
subject: Racism, anti-Semitism, and the GOP
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JON OSSOFF FOR SENATE
body:
The Charlottesville white supremacist rally was three years ago today. |
---
Friend,

On this day three years ago, white supremacists held a rally in Charlottesville, Virginia that killed one woman, injured 19 others, and terrorized this country.

Nazis and Klansmen were walking around in broad daylight, flaunting their allegiances.

_Friend, the overwhelming majority of Americans want peaceful co-existence, tolerance, and unity._

**But President Donald Trump and his shameless enablers like Senator David Perdue have indulged and empowered a hateful few to poison our culture and our politics, ripping the country apart in the process.**

They accepted it when Trump launched his campaign calling Mexican immigrants "rapists." They accepted it when Trump tried to ban Muslims from entering the country.

And, of course, they accepted it when Trump called the white supremacists "very fine people" after they chanted "Jews will not replace us!" at that rally in Charlottesville.

For Trump's enablers, there was no Republican outcry. There was no censure.

**So unfortunately, is it any surprise that Senator Perdue's campaign has stooped to blatant anti-Semitism in its ads, and that Perdue -- a sitting United States Senator -- still refuses to apologize for it?**

It was only a few weeks ago that David Perdue's campaign ran a digital attack ad that doctored an image of my face to enlarge and extend my nose, a well-known anti-Semitic trope.

**Friend, we have to win overwhelmingly in November to send a message that will echo down through history: This is not who the American people are, and the American people will not accept political leaders who call white supremacists "very fine people" and run anti-Semitic attack ads.**

_When my mother immigrated to America at 23, she came here because she believed in this country. The last four years have broken her heart._

We must restore America's soul so that our political leadership represents the goodness, decency, compassion, and tolerance of the American people.

**[Please send $10 right now to keep building unstoppable momentum in Georgia. I need you now more than ever.](https://go.electjon.com/page/m/177e2663/5b2c1286/3ec640f2/25f1f1e2/917037623/VEsH/?g=_FNKN1DdY9BfCqelLAMjFg "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_2020_08_12_jo_char?refcode=em_2020_08_12_jo_char&amount=10")**

subject: $17 million
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Mark Warner
body:
|
---

| |
| _**" No one is above the law,
not even the President, and especially not the President."**
-- Senator Mark Warner_
---

[Keep Mark in the Senate working for us](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85db45/53d9897e/540230ce/1c882c8d/3221096474/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjcwMyJ9/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/warner-continue?refcode=20200812_f_1_nd__703__&refcode2=ask1&amount=5")
---
Derek:

**Donald Trump has raked in more than $17 million through his hotels since he was elected -- from his own presidential campaign and the Republican National Committee.** This latest use of the presidential office for personal gain is just further proof that Trump believes he's accountable to no one -- especially not to the American people.

A big reason for that is congressional Republicans have stood by silently for four years, refusing to hold President Trump accountable. That's why it's so imperative that we take back the White House and the Senate this November. **That can 't happen unless we re-elect Mark Warner and keep Virginia blue.**
[Chip in now to re-elect Mark](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85db45/53d9897e/540230ce/1c882c8c/3221096474/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjcwMyJ9/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/warner-continue?refcode=20200812_f_1_nd__703__&refcode2=ask2&amount=5")
---
Not even a pandemic surging across the country is enough to stop the President from using his position to enrich himself. Second-quarter filing data shows that Trump's joint fundraising committee with the RNC, "Trump Victory," forked over another $400,000 to Trump hotels in March to treat RNC donors to a private Mar-a-Lago retreat.

Derek, there may be nothing we can do to make Republicans honor their constitutional obligation to hold the President accountable. What we can do is make sure this is Mitch McConnell and Senate Republicans' last year in the majority. **As Mark faces his toughest re-election yet, we need your help to hold this Democratic Senate seat and flip the Senate. If you're able, will you chip in now to keep Mark in Washington fighting for us?**

Peter, we hope you won't miss out on your chance to attend such an exciting event. These grassroots fundraisers have been some of Joe's favorite parts of the past few months, and this one is sure to be no exception.

This will be a great chance for Kamala Harris to re-introduce herself to all of Team Joe, and for all of us to show her that we've got her back in the months to come.

Plus, whatever you're able to chip in will go directly towards making sure that we elect Joe, and Kamala, and Democrats up and down the ballot in November!

**So, Peter, will you chip in to the grassroots fundraiser right now? In your receipt will be the link to access the event tonight at 6:30 PM Eastern Time.**

Biden-Harris HQ

To update and correct your information [click here](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931bb70/1cd0ac28/161328766/357e0c3b/2911168128/VEsHAA/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/s/update-info-bvf"). If you would like to unsubscribe, [click here](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931bb70/1cd0ac28/161328766/357e0c3a/2911168128/VEsHAw/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/content/bvf-unsubscribe/").

Peter, thank you so much for supporting Joe Biden and the Democrats.

This isn't the time to be complacent. If you are ready to fight for the soul of this nation, you can start by donating to elect Joe Biden and Democrats up and down the ballot by clicking the button below.

| [DONATE »](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931bb70/1cd0ac28/161328766/357e0c39/2911168128/VEsHAg/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bvf-homepage&refcode=VF_EM_FR_2020.06.16_B8_footer_X__F1_S1_C1__footer?amount=25")

We know we send a lot of emails, and we are sorry about that. The reason? We are relying on grassroots supporters like you (we're serious!).

If you'd like to unsubscribe from our emails, you can [click here](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931bb70/1cd0ac28/161328766/357e0c3a/2911168128/VEsHDQ/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/content/bvf-unsubscribe/").

We sincerely thank you for your help and support.
\- Biden Victory Fund
Paid for by Biden Victory Fund, a joint fundraising committee authorized by Biden for President, the Democratic National Committee and the State Democratic Parties in these states: AK, AL, AZ, CO, DE, FL, GA, ID, IN, KS, KY, LA, MA, MD, ME, MI, MN, MO, MS, MT, NC, ND, NE, NH, NJ, NM, NV, NY, OH, PA, SC, TN, TX, VA, VT, WI, AND WV.
_Contributions or gifts to Biden Victory Fund are not tax deductible.

The first $5,600/$10,000 from a person/multicandidate committee ("PAC") will be allocated to Biden for President, with the first $2,800/$5,000 designated for the primary and the next $2,800/$5,000 for the general election. For contributions made after the primary, the full amount of the contribution, up to $2,800/$5,000, will be designated for the general election. The next $35,500/$15,000 from a person/PAC will be allocated to the DNC. The next $150,000/$75,000 from a person/PAC will be split equally among the Democratic state parties from: AZ, CO, FL, GA, MI, MN, NC, NE, NH, NV, OH, PA, TX, VA, and WI. The next $110,000/$55,000 from a person/PAC will be split equally among the Democratic state parties from: AL, DE, KS, LA, MA, MD, MS, NJ, NY, VT, and WV. The next $110,000/$55,000 from a person/PAC will be split equally among the Democratic state parties from: AK, ID, IN, KY, ME, MO, MT, ND, NM, SC, and TN. Any additional funds will be allocated to the DNC, subject to applicable contribution limits.

The allocation listed above may change if a contributor designates their contribution for a particular participant(s) or if following it would result in an excessive contribution. Contributions will be used in connection with federal elections, may be spent on any activity as each committee determines in its sole discretion, and will not be earmarked for any particular candidate. Federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the name, mailing address, occupation, and name of employer of individuals whose contributions exceed $200 per election cycle._

This will be a great chance for Kamala Harris to re-introduce herself to all of Team Joe, and for all of us to show her that we've got her back in the months to come. Plus, whatever you're able to chip in will go directly towards making sure that we elect Joe, and Kamala, and Democrats up and down the ballot in November! So, Peter, will you chip in to the grassroots fundraiser right now? In your receipt will be the link to access the event tonight at 6:30 PM Eastern Time. "" Thanks for being a part of this, Biden-Harris HQ P.S. If you've already donated to the fundraiser at a different email address, thank you! Your spot at the event is secured, and you can find the link in your inbox! | | "" "" "" "" Any donor history information in this email reflects what we have on file for this specific email address. If you have donated with a different email, with a check, or with a spouse -- thank you so much! We have that on file and cannot thank you enough for supporting this campaign.

Did you see the “BIG” news? Kamala Harris has been selected as presumptive Joe Biden’s Vice President pick. Peter, did you see the “BIG” news?
Kamala Harris has been selected as presumptive Joe Biden’s Vice President pick.
How predictable. One Swamp Creature helping out a fellow Swamp Creature.
Kamala is part of the Far Left Establishment who supports radical policies like eliminating private health insurance, Medicare-For-All, and the Green New Deal.

name: Gina Raimondo
subject: Contact tracing
body:
Your RI COVID-19 News Update
---
| | | | | |
---
| Hello friend,
I want to talk to you today about contact tracing. This is an area in which Rhode Island stepped up early, and the experience of other countries makes it clear that this is one of the most important ingredients in staying ahead of the virus. We know that the quicker we can track down contacts, monitor for symptoms and get tested, the more effectively we can stop the spread. In this regard, I have three requests for you and your family, friends, and neighbors.
---
| [ ](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001LzKGnqBeB7vvC6xN3ITvmnLdajLj6pOJp2mJPs-E6vneR2qGWU7e0pheBqWINU0I3Gy0oCWTo8I6q_TSlpu51BZ-d5bnqZVBZKyC0DgpbMZFEpVRCy7ifQs4HVDQXR2wi2KNolmbYr1Yc8Be5-DUovGl39B5uPvhYooAJxe4PPcIKgNy2ifXFJBPvF1FXF8PFGExNrOh6wM=&c=hTrb_mJiSUncuo7HURSytd0tPauRkBNfrO5loIN5TMVMGJpMNlSezA==&ch=cksgN-Qq-sGBMaJprkej642p0c7pWwcLDtai8T33mc3L6Eg2wjqeCQ==)
---
|
* First, I want to again ask everyone to keep your contact tracing journal. Take one minute every day to write down the names of everyone you saw that day. You can even do it right in your Crush COVID app.

* Second, if you're the one organizing a gathering, even if it's just having a few people over for dinner, please make sure you write down the names and phone numbers of everyone you have over. If someone tests positive and says they were at your house, the contact tracers' first call will be to you, and they'll need to know the names and numbers of everyone who was there.

* Third, if you get called by the contact tracers, please answer the phone and provide your information. I know people may be hesitant to provide information over the phone, but I want to assure you that the no personally identifiable information is stored in the system, and all the information you provide is protected by the strictest privacy standards under HIPAA.

I also want to remind everyone of the golden rule in this pandemic - the number one thing we keep repeating. If you are sick at all - even if it's just a headache - stay home. We've started to see more reports of people going to work when they're sick, and this is directly correlated to workplace transmission of COVID. I know there can be a lot of pressure to still go in, particularly if you only have one symptom and otherwise you're feeling fine, but we all have a civic duty right now to resist that pressure. If you have any symptoms, stay home and get tested. And stay in quarantine while you're waiting on your test results.
---
| [ ](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001LzKGnqBeB7vvC6xN3ITvmnLdajLj6pOJp2mJPs-E6vneR2qGWU7e0qpH66g3i3C_SCkYI52k_0_OUqkcIpOznZS1uHbG_-N1rBs5WmYQZGaIuelV7dpPM_8wDZ57anSM-WmwfQF7yasSMhJZ220mHxcGDNge96xlwABIpFo5WlpNF74rNfeBe_RTopT04Q-39UG4x3hAssA=&c=hTrb_mJiSUncuo7HURSytd0tPauRkBNfrO5loIN5TMVMGJpMNlSezA==&ch=cksgN-Qq-sGBMaJprkej642p0c7pWwcLDtai8T33mc3L6Eg2wjqeCQ==)
---
| Click the graph to see check the Department of Health's [COVID-19 data dashboard](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001LzKGnqBeB7vvC6xN3ITvmnLdajLj6pOJp2mJPs-E6vneR2qGWU7e0qpH66g3i3C_SCkYI52k_0_OUqkcIpOznZS1uHbG_-N1rBs5WmYQZGaIuelV7dpPM_8wDZ57anSM-WmwfQF7yasSMhJZ220mHxcGDNge96xlwABIpFo5WlpNF74rNfeBe_RTopT04Q-39UG4x3hAssA=&c=hTrb_mJiSUncuo7HURSytd0tPauRkBNfrO5loIN5TMVMGJpMNlSezA==&ch=cksgN-Qq-sGBMaJprkej642p0c7pWwcLDtai8T33mc3L6Eg2wjqeCQ==).
---
| As a reminder, tomorrow's guest on our Facebook Live forum will be one of our nation's leading public health experts, Dr. Anthony Fauci. I'm looking forward to a robust and thoughtful conversation with Dr. Fauci about our plan for schools, the health benefits of in-person learning, and the precautions that need to be in place to be confident in the safety of our schools. I hope you'll tune in on my [Facebook](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001LzKGnqBeB7vvC6xN3ITvmnLdajLj6pOJp2mJPs-E6vneR2qGWU7e0paq1WgvHbnjYcqKY3w04ns14cRJxSKTeUm_qxcHj5Kw4q41_2sZdlas-ZY5-OCB9lfETC_scHIJb-Dt5a4GCNQuyrYTRRuiuEy6wzuzaZsbO5VjpbLQFzY=&c=hTrb_mJiSUncuo7HURSytd0tPauRkBNfrO5loIN5TMVMGJpMNlSezA==&ch=cksgN-Qq-sGBMaJprkej642p0c7pWwcLDtai8T33mc3L6Eg2wjqeCQ==) page at 3 p.m. tomorrow. We're all in this together,
-Gina Raimondo Governor
---
| | Governor's Office | 82 Smith Street, Providence, RI 02903
---
| [Unsubscribe dpwillis67@gmail.com](https://visitor.constantcontact.com/do?p=un&m=001_rvij1smacIHQplL2vH8YA%3D&ch=e9e38b2e-7e90-11ea-b887-d4ae5292c4bc&ca=5466a812-703c-4a5e-b6a3-326eb8ac7773)
---

Sent by [communications@governor.ri.gov](mailto:communications@governor.ri.gov) powered by

name: Holcomb Crew
subject: One Indiana - Best BBQ in Indiana
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Eric Holcomb for Indiana
body:
We LOVE Hoosier BBQ here at the Holcomb Crew, and have tried quite a few places in Indiana. [ ](http://links.holcombforindiana.com/u/click?_t=60bbc6d769fe4010b248f63c6cb0e872&_m=dccbc69fc4b14a01a6ff7fb2e91c5a6d&_e=KO9fYPKGDEhnQtr_aXUEuL7oRkFEWqRZr2BJqzMKWSey5tS98_zA8LQQb-N86YMqncJHExfxQadAm-7QKTZ70oav4IAy8R7v6tRACaPt_e_AmBS8YChMBFfdQ-N6U28mjvoIU6lX5j8wBuZs1w1mpbG87JHB1nJljVOc-5l8EclTD1jzjP-5go9PjWTELLz6TkADhYP2EVqjkZ2_eZjaSEE5zKfjKLM9yEainvbXdqkjjORx0JJWl4izEPi5lCAvJcr7KvLHhza6pm_Yza1FKAtGoBi6i-y6qBZnYRaQL1mFVVHxtTXEqyi2gzTE52Uh0NgQ7whH9Jt1b74ixVtaPNKEjW9QSIvtexQhijQXDCebRv8Hn6v1x9O_1tuUsdZno4pi_Vqv-10imlN_CKlij8gszfjp0ZFjImZ-UzYFD0jSRGPPgBoRd17hndTIoV7FsR6e-tDKoU3s7_3WH7PfSGuMg5cz2ri8lGU8Ag-G4Xs%3D) Friend, Summer is in full swing, and that means it’s time for BBQ.
We LOVE Hoosier BBQ here at the Holcomb Crew, and so does Eric. After all, who can resist the smell of pork, brisket and chicken in the smoker? So as Indiana re-opens, we wanted to share with you a list of some of Eric’s favorite places to chow down on slow-cooked meats.
_Restaurants are starting to reopen, and we can safely support them! clean_body: We LOVE Hoosier BBQ here at the Holcomb Crew, and have tried quite a few places in Indiana. Friend, Summer is in full swing, and that means it’s time for BBQ. We LOVE Hoosier BBQ here at the Holcomb Crew, and so does Eric. After all, who can resist the smell of pork, brisket and chicken in the smoker? So as Indiana re-opens, we wanted to share with you a list of some of Eric’s favorite places to chow down on slow-cooked meats. Restaurants are starting to reopen, and we can safely support them! Remember — as you start to patronize your favorite restaurants and local businesses, be sure to check the. Local leaders and the businesses in your community might have additional requirements, too, so be sure to check with them, and please follow all guidelines. Check out our list, and let us know if we missed your favorite spot. \- Some of the best BBQ in the whole state, don’t miss out on trying their award-winning brisket and ribs! \- They know the true meaning of low and slow. Their hickory-smoked BBQ is mouthwatering, smoky goodness, and one of our absolute favorites! \- Follow your nose on I-69, and you'll find yourself in a large log cabin in Daleville with perfectly smoked meats. \- They smoke both their brisket and their pork for more than 24 hours...enough said. You gotta check it out. \- One of the first BBQ restaurants in Indiana! When you get to the drive-through, be prepared for a long line (it’s worth it). \- Born out of a competition BBQ team, Shigs serves up award-winning BBQ and their founders still compete in contests across the Midwest. \- Back in the 90s, you might have had Rick’s meats at the Parke County Covered Bridge Festival. Today you’ll find his BBQ full-time in Terre Haute! \- This is absolutely one of Indiana’s most unique restaurants and a great place to get a bite. And, yes, it’s inside an actual firehouse! \- Come enjoy some of Indiana’s finest BBQ outdoors! \- Right on Notre Dame’s campus, this classic Hoosier eatery serves thousands of hungry students every single year. \- Lined with award-winning wood carvings, animal trophies, and Harley Davidson decor, you have to come see Thirty-Six Saloon for yourself. \- They are committed to being 100% local, and are proud members of Indiana grown. ** \- Come and see for yourself why “farm to table, doesn’t have to cost an arm & a leg!” Thanks for reading our list! No matter whether you’re dining in or ordering take-out, be sure to be safe while supporting our Hoosier small businesses. Know a great BBQ place we haven’t listed here? We definitely want to know about it! Let us know using the comment box below. Thanks for reading — we’ll be in touch soon. -Your Holcomb Crew | | | | | | Paid for by Eric Holcomb for Indiana. © Copyright 2020. All rights reserved. | | Eric Holcomb for Indiana, 101 W Ohio Street, Suite 2200, Indianapolis, IN 46204 | (317) 569-0709 | | This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com | | |

Laura Loomer

subject: Trump and the GOP attack Social Security, even in a pandemic
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Dani for Illinois
body:
| | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/c7039572e251/trump-and-the-gop-attack-social-security-even-in-a-pandemic?e=140a9b81e7)
---
| |
---
| |
#
Trump and his Republican friends just went after Social Security in the middle of a global pandemic. Even for them, this is a shameful move that threatens the retirement of an entire generation of Americans.

Instead of working together to make sure the people get real relief, **Trump bypassed Congress to threaten the future of Social Security and his Republican buddies cheered him on. **They even used the pandemic as an excuse to do this, claiming it will help working people in these desperate times. You and I both know that couldn't be further from the truth.

**[Click here to chip in and unseat a Pro-Trump Republican ](https://daniforillinois.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=16d8d19eb3a417b5b09061c0d&id=f167cb3af6&e=140a9b81e7)**

Adam Kinzinger has been silent on this issue since Trump signed his executive order, but we know he stands with Trump on going after Social Security. **Kinzinger is a conservative Republican who has talked about capping and cutting Social Security throughout his career, and it's time to unseat him. **

When I am in Congress, I'll fight tooth and nail to protect Social Security from any cuts. But I need your help to get there. [Can you make a contribution today, and help us fight all the way to November?](https://daniforillinois.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=16d8d19eb3a417b5b09061c0d&id=93616a3d5d&e=140a9b81e7)

I'm not afraid to stand up and fight to protect Social Security, and I need you to stand with me.

Dani Brzozowski
Democratic Nominee for Congress, IL-16

Born and raised on a small farm in Nambe, New Mexico, by a union ironworker and a public school employee, Ben Ray is running for Senate to build a better future for all families.

Ben Ray knows that our communities are stronger when everyone has a fair shot. He's dedicated his career to creating good-paying jobs for hardworking New Mexicans, expanding health care, and protecting our natural resources.

As Assistant Speaker in the U.S. House of Representatives, Ben Ray has worked to pass a people-first agenda that helps all Americans -- from lowering prescription drug prices to preventing gun violence, protecting our immigrant communities, improving equity in our criminal justice system, and removing the dark influence of money in politics. He is proud to be endorsed by Planned Parenthood Action Fund, NARAL Pro-Choice America, AFSCME, American Nurses Association, League of Conservation Voters, Brady Campaign to End Gun Violence, Giffords, Human Rights Campaign, Latino Victory Fund, Congressional Black Caucus PAC, Council for a Livable World, and End Citizens United.

**Ben Ray doesn 't take a dollar from corporate PACs. Will you pitch in to fund our people-powered movement today?** **[DONATE MONTHLY](https://act.benraylujan.com/page/m/40f6b2f9/18e32a7f/4dc3856e/7b210193/487985566/VEsHBg/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/brl_email?refcode=email_footer_donate&amount=25&recurring=on&recur_weekly=on")** We know that we send you a lot of emails. If you would like to unsubscribe completely, we understand. Click [_here_](https://act.benraylujan.com/page/m/40f6b2f9/18e32a7f/4dc3856e/7b210196/487985566/VEsHDQ/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.benrlujan.com/unsubscribe") to unsubscribe and your request will be promptly processed.

name: =?utf-8?Q?The=20White=20House?=
subject: Canceling school hurts low-income and minority families the most
body:
President Trump welcomed a group of teachers, parents, and physicians to the White House today to discuss... | | | | [ ](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=704232a0dd&e=3ee4985eea)
---
| The White House • August 12, 2020
---
| | |
# **Canceling school hurts low-income and minority families the most**

**President Trump** welcomed a group of teachers, parents, and physicians to the White House today to discuss how best to get American children back to school safely this fall.

🎬 [**Kellyanne Conway: 65 percent of parents worry kids will fall behind**](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=df1959ed2f&e=3ee4985eea)

**Half of low-income** families and 42 percent of families of color lack sufficient devices at home to access distance learning. Nearly 30 million American students rely on schools for free or reduced-cost meals, and more than 70 percent of children receiving mental health services do so at school.

**Closed schools **put vulnerable students and families at risk. When the American Academy of Pediatrics issued its call to safely reopen schools this fall, it explained that in-person school helps reduce children’s risk of abuse, drug addiction, and suicide.

**The CDC** has recognized that it is a public health priority to return students to in-person learning, and it has [**released guidelines**](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=9d2d60ded3&e=3ee4985eea) to help communities do just that. “We are working literally day in and day out with governors and state education leaders to find a way that we can safely reopen our schools,” Vice President Pence said.

**The bottom line:** Keeping our schools shut down would do more harm than good.

**“I thought digital learning** was the future, but we have learned through this COVID crisis that we haven’t got digital learning to the point where you can really engage young people,” Dr. Paul Peterson told President Trump today.

🎬 [**Dr. Peterson: “They’ve got to be in that classroom.”**](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=77cad30d06&e=3ee4985eea)

**President Trump** wants to ensure that students, parents, and communities have the support they need to educate children safely this fall. He has called on Congress to provide more than $100 billion in education funding as part of the next Coronavirus relief package, $70 billion of which will go directly to helping K-12 schools remain open.

**If schools don’t reopen** in certain states or communities, funding should go directly to students, allowing parents to explore other options such as private, charter, religious, or home schooling to educate their kids.

**“If the school is closed,** why are we paying the school?” President Trump asked. “I’d rather give it to the student or the parents.”

**Fortunately, the case for reopening** is backed by science. There is an extremely small risk of serious illness to children from the Coronavirus. According to a Journal of the American Medical Association Pediatrics study, “children are at far greater risk of critical illness from influenza than COVID-19.”

**While vulnerable populations** in schools must be protected, most K-12 teachers are relatively young. The median age for these educators is 41, and over 90 percent are under the age of 60. For people under 60, Coronavirus fatality rates are so low that they are less than or equal to those associated with the seasonal flu.

**“The science is so clear** that the risk of death or hospitalization for children with this virus is so, so low,” said Dr. Melanie McGraw Piasecki, a mother of three. “But we know the risks of missing school are catastrophic. We probably don’t even know how high they are yet.”

**Shutting down schools** is not the answer. A safe reopening that follows public health guidance is.

🎬 [**President Trump: “I would like the money to follow the student.”**](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=96a84147ee&e=3ee4985eea)

**READ MORE:**[**We can reopen our schools safely**](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=2e23351cef&e=3ee4985eea)
